title: Cyber Security Engineer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsultkollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av IT-säkerhet och systemutveckling i komplexa miljöer
* Djup kunskap inom Windows Server och Windows-klient-OS, inklusive säkerhetsfunktioner, AD, GPO och behörighetsstyrning
* Erfarenhet av Linux-miljöer, nätverkssäkerhet (brandvägg, VPN, IDS/IPS) och systemhärdning
* Goda kunskaper i skriptning (PowerShell, Bash eller Python) för automation och konfigurationsstyrning
* Förståelse för NIS 2-direktivet, ISO 27001 eller NIST 800-53, samt erfarenhet av säkerhetsgranskning och riskhantering
* Förmåga att skriva tydlig teknisk dokumentation på svenska och engelska

  

**Meriterande**  

* Kunskap om autentisering, fillagring, databaser och virtualisering
* Erfarenhet av automatiserad konfigurationsstyrning och DevSecOps-metoder

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 05-04-2026 **Om Oss**  

Att jobba på Deploja är något helt annat än att arbeta på ett vanligt konsultbolag – och det är vi riktigt stolta över. Vad är det då som gör oss unika?

  

Vi erbjuder helt enkelt mer än bara hög lön och större frihet, det är bara början. Hos oss hittar du den arbetsmiljö och de möjligheter du förtjänar. Här påverkar du din egen lön som helt och hållet som baseras på ditt timpris mot kund.


Vår lönemodell är en hybridlösning mellan en fast månadslön och en provisionsbaserad ersättning. Det innebär att din månadslön baseras på ditt timpris, fast om du mot förmodan skulle stå utan uppdrag så behåller du en grund lön fram tills vi hittat ett nytt uppdrag, bra va?

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstebil – vi uppmuntrar dig att välja en elbil för en mer hållbar framtid.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.

title: Systemekonom
description:
Vi söker en engagerad och affärsdriven **Dataansvarig & Verksamhetsutvecklare** som vill vara med och skapa effektiva, datadrivna processer inom Ekonomi & Inköp samt driva vår dataförvaltning för hela företaget. Rollen är placerad i kärnan av verksamheten där du samarbetar med ledare i hela organisationen för att driva förbättring och tillväxt.

**Om rollen**


Som Dataansvarig & Verksamhetsutvecklare är du en nyckelperson för att utveckla och förvalta vår dataförvaltning i samarbete med alla funktioner och ledare i hela företaget, samt driva verksamhetsutveckling inom Ekonomi & Inköp. Du kommer arbeta tvärfunktionellt med bland annat IT, ekonomi- och inköpsteam, samt ledningsfunktioner för att skapa lösningar som förbättrar kvalitet, effektivitet och beslutsstöd.


Vi har nyligen startat upp arbetet med vår dataförvaltning och du ansvarar för att utveckla, strukturera och koordinera dataförvaltning enligt fastställda strategier och initiativ. Du ansvarar också för att designa och förbättra processer för analys, rapportering och operativt arbete inom Ekonomi & Inköp. Rollen kombinerar operativt arbete med strategiskt förbättrings- och förändringsarbete, där du också driver projekt och utbildning kopplat till digitalisering, automatisering och dataanvändning. Rollen är placerad på Svenska Retursystems fina kontor i centrala Stockholm. Resor inom Sverige kan förekomma.

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**

**Dataansvarig – för hela företaget**

* Ansvara för struktur och arbetssätt inom dataförvaltning, driva detta i linje med handbok och etablerade forum
* Koordinera arbetet mellan dataägare, dataförvaltare, IT och verksamhet
* Säkerställa implementering av affärsregler och datastrategi
* Leda arbete med dataordbok, klassificering och uppföljning av datakvalitet
* Stödja förändringsledning för mer datadriven kultur
* Identifiera, prioritera och implementera nya dataområden under styrning

**Verksamhetsutvecklare – Ekonomi & Inköp**

* Kartlägga och analysera ekonomiska och inköpsrelaterade processer i samarbete med chefer
* Följa upp, utveckla och uppdatera processer, arbetssätt och dokumentation
* Driva projekt för implementering av nya arbetssätt, system eller automatisering
* Säkerställa utbildning och förändringsledning för medarbetare
* Samverka med IT och övriga delar av verksamheten för helhetslösningar
* Deltaga i systemförvaltning på taktisk nivå
* Följa upp och utvärdera effekt av genomförda förändringar

**Vem är du?**


Vi söker dig med relevant akademisk utbildning inom ekonomi eller liknande område, samt minst 3 års erfarenhet inom ekonomistyrning, controlling eller redovisning. Du har god vana av projektledning, processutveckling och trivs med att arbeta i en komplex miljö där du bidrar till både struktur och förbättring.


Som person är du analytisk, strukturerad och har en förmåga att kommunicera tydligt, både i tal och skrift. Du har ett intresse för data, ny teknik och digitala verktyg samt vana att arbeta med IT-stödda processer (ERP, BI, Office-paketet mm.). Du är trygg i förändringsarbete, coachande i din stil och trivs i en roll med många kontaktytor.

**Kvalifikationer**

* Kandidatexamen inom ekonomi eller relevant ämnesområde
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet inom redovisning / controlling / ekonomistyrning
* Erfarenhet av projektledning och processutveckling
* Mycket god vana/förmåga/intresse av att arbeta med data
* Erfarenhet av förvaltning är meriterande
* Mycket goda IT-kunskaper (Office, ERP, BI)
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift

**Det här kan vi erbjuda dig**


Här får du möjlighet att vara med och forma framtidens arbete inom data för hela företaget och verksamhetsutveckling för Ekonomi & Inköp. Du kommer att ha ett nära samarbete med chefer och nyckelpersoner i organisationen, utvecklande projektansvar och en roll där dina idéer får genomslag i verksamheten.

**Låter detta som din nästa utmaning?**


I denna rekrytering samarbetar Svenska Retursystem med Mpya Finance. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande så skicka gärna in din ansökan snarast möjligt. Har du frågor gällande rekryteringsprocessen eller kring tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvariga rekryteringskonsulter Italo Paras, italo.paras@mpya.se eller Elin Allskog, elin.allskog@mpya.se.

**Om Svenska Retursystem**

*Hos oss får du växa i ett hållbarhetsdrivet företag där vårt cirkulära system och våra medarbetares engagemang gör skillnad på riktigt.*

*Tjänsten är placerad på vårt huvudkontor vid Vasagatan i centrala Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete enligt 3:2.*

*Vi erbjuder marknadsmässig lön, bonusprogram, pensionsavsättning, friskvårdsbidrag samt andra förmåner.*

*Svenska Retursystem är det smarta cirkulära systemet för landets livsmedel. Bolagets uppdrag handlar om att göra Sveriges livsmedelskedja effektiv och hållbar. Grundidén är att branschens distribution ska ske med gemensamma pallar och lådor som kan användas om och om igen. Ett av bolagets främsta mål är att minska livsmedelsbranschens klimatpåverkan. Bolaget ägs till lika delar av Svensk Dagligvaruhandel och Dagligvaruleverantörerna****.***

***Att jobba på Svenska Retursystem***  

*Allt startar med våra medarbetare. Med deras kunskap, initiativkraft och engagemang skapar vi trygga och långsiktiga relationer med våra kunder och våra samarbetspartners. För oss är hållbarhet en central del i verksamheten och oavsett roll så är vi stolta över att jobba på ett företag med hållbarhetsambitioner som vill vara med och ta fram lösningarna för en hållbar livsmedelskedja.*

*Vi är under ständig utveckling och hos oss står det aldrig stilla. Trots att vi vuxit till ett stort bolag genomsyras vi fortfarande av en stark entreprenörsanda, en anda vi är stolta över och måna om att behålla.*

*Hos oss har alla människor ett lika värde, vi har rättvisa anställningsvillkor och vi strävar efter en jämn köns- och åldersfördelning. Vi vill främja mångfald och inkludering i allt vi gör, och genom att välkomna olika perspektiv och erfarenheter skapar vi en dynamisk arbetsmiljö.*

title: IT-tekniker
description:
**Ska-krav:**  

Minst fem (5) års erfarenhet av:

* Drift av Microsoft SharePoint, installationen ska vara On-Prem
* DBA inom Microsoft SQL
* Windows server
* Microsoft AD
* Powershell

  

**Var god förklara hur du uppfyller alla kraven.**

title: Senior IT-projektledare
description:
**Ansök nu**

**Bli en del av Coop – Tillsammans gör vi mat-Sverige hållbart!**


**Om tjänsten:**



Vill du vara med och forma framtidens hållbara dagligvaruhandel? Som Senior IT-projektledare på Coop Sverige får du möjlighet att driva komplexa projekt med fokus på butiksdrift, butiksnära system och digitala lösningar för dagligvaruhandeln, samtidigt som du bidrar till vår omfattande transformationsresa inom en bred systemflora.



Vi söker dig som har passion för att leda förändring inom IT och som trivs i en verksamhetsnära miljö där butikens behov, stabil drift och kundupplevelse står i centrum.



Som Senior IT-projektledare kommer du att arbeta med att:


* Leda, styra och managera komplexa IT-projekt kopplade till butiksdrift, butikssystem och verksamhetskritiska lösningar inom dagligvaruhandeln
* Säkerställa att det finns rätt resurser på rätt nivå för att leverera projekt i tid, inom budget och med hög kvalitet
* Driva, utveckla och säkerställa projektmetodik (mallar, business case, beslutsformer m.m.)
* Leda projektdeltagare och skapa förutsättningar för lyckad leverans genom tydlig styrning och effektiv problemlösning
* Planera och följa upp omfattning, kostnader, tidplan, risker och andra nyckelfaktorer
* Säkerställa smidig implementering av lösningar i butik och god överlämning till förvaltning
* Säkerställa att leverantörer möter projektets krav och tidplaner
* Sätta samman och utveckla högpresterande projektteam med rätt kompetens
* Säkerställa god överlämning av projektresultat och dokumentation till mottagarorganisation



Vi är ett team av IT-projektledare som tillsammans skapar förutsättningar för samarbete och utveckling av Coops IT-landskap med tydligt fokus på verksamhetsnytta.


**Vem är du?**



Vi söker dig som drivs av struktur, framdrift och verksamhetsnära IT. Du har en stark kommunikativ förmåga, är lösningsorienterad och har ett tryggt ledarskap som skapar engagemang och förtroende. Du är van att arbeta i komplexa miljöer där IT, verksamhet och externa leverantörer samverkar.


**För att vara framgångsrik i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:**


* Erfarenhet av att leda större IT-projekt, gärna med koppling till butiksdrift eller butikssystem
* God förståelse för systemstöd i dagligvaruhandeln, exempelvis kassasystem, kampanj- och prissättningssystem, order, sortiment eller butiksnära plattformar
* Bred kunskap om olika projektstyrningsmodeller
* Erfarenhet av både traditionella och agila utvecklings- och implementeringsmetoder
* Vana att leda såväl interna team som externa leverantörer och sourcingpartners
* Erfarenhet av förändringsledning i verksamhetskritiska miljöer
* Meriterande med erfarenhet från dagligvaruhandeln eller annan retailverksamhet
* Meriterande med erfarenhet av GK Cloud 4 Retail
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska
* Gärna bakgrund från IT-konsultbolag eller större organisationer med komplex struktur


**Vårt erbjudande till dig:**  

Vi erbjuder dig en arbetsplats där du får möjlighet att växa och utvecklas i en inkluderande och inspirerande kultur. Hos oss på Coop blir du en del av ett engagerat team som bidrar till en mer hållbar framtid. Vi arbetar från kontoret tre dagar i veckan och erbjuder flexibilitet resterande dagar. Vi erbjuder konkurrenskraftiga förmåner och en god balans mellan arbete och fritid.


**Så ansöker du:**  

Låter detta som din nästa utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt då vi arbetar löpande med urval och intervjuer. För att rättvist matcha kandidater med de krav som rollen ställer kommer vi att använda tester under urvalsarbetet.



Om du har några frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta rekryterande ledare Karin Bianconi på e-postadress: Karin.Bianconi@coop.se

title: Solution Engineer - Innovation Hub
description:
**Overview** **Microsoft Innovation Hub** empowers customers to overcome their business challenges through innovative engagements that integrate multiple areas of expertise. We drive AI transformation by leveraging evolving needs and emerging business opportunities. As the future of technologists and enterprise technical sellers, we guide customers from envisioning solutions to implementation. We deliver the Microsoft value story through immersive experiences, strengthening customer trust through deep engagements in exceptional environments.  

As a **Solution Engineer in the Microsoft Innovation Hub**, you will merge business and technical requirements to craft comprehensive solutions, working seamlessly with various stakeholders. You will conduct discovery sessions to understand customer needs and provide strategic recommendations and best practices tailored to their specific needs. Implementing robust AI transformation solutions and optimizing the integration of various technologies and services will be key aspects of your role. Additionally, you will leverage consultancy skills to foster collaboration among technical resources and stakeholders, ensuring alignment and effective teamwork. This role is Microsoft onsite only.  

Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities*** Delivering customer engagements: Prepare and deliver technical engagements including strategy sessions, envisioning workshops, architecture design sessions and rapid prototyping to demonstrate key capabilities, validate against identified risks and finalize technology choices.
* AI Transformation Leadership: Be the trusted voice within the business and for customers on the latest AI platform and technology trends, guiding their transformation journeys. By prioritizing AI use cases through design thinking workshops, you will lead these journeys effectively. You will be a valued contributor to Microsoft’s strategy in your area, ensuring the Hub is proactively aligned with the right customers to drive real impact.
* Strategic Vision and Planning: Own and execute a clear strategic vision for AI transformation initiatives on a set of targeted accounts, aligning with organizational goals and customer needs by collaborating and orchestrating cross-functional teams.
* Solution Design and Architecture: Develop comprehensive solution architectures based on patterns and practices that are tied to customer requirements and ensure that solutions are scalable, secure and optimized for performance. By utilizing consultation skills, you will uncover and prioritize opportunities, ensuing solutions are addressing real customer needs.
* Cross Platform Collaboration: Adopt a holistic approach to integrate capabilities across the entire cloud platform, identifying synergies and optimizing cross-platform integration. You will work with your peers and stakeholders to make the Innovation Hub the home of Cross Solution AI Transformation.
* Technical Depth: Maintain and grow expertise in creating business value on top of the business applications including sales, services and marketing and Microsoft 365 platform to support AI transformation initiatives. Stay updated with the market trends and collaborate with the technical communities.
* Technical Sales and Sales Leadership: Act as a strategic change agent within the business to shape Microsoft's programs and engineering offerings. Lead the creation of scalable, field-relevant assets through internal communities. Champion Hub engagement success by connecting technical capabilities to sales opportunities and serving as a trusted voice with sales leaders and account teams.
 **Qualifications** **Required:**

* Master’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field **OR** Bachelor’s Degree in a related field **OR** equivalent hands-on experience.
* **Several** years of experience in technical pre‑sales, technical consulting, or a similar customer‑facing technical role.
* **Fluency in Swedish and English.**
**Preferred Qualifications**:

* **Enterprise Architecture:** Proven experience designing and delivering large‑scale, complex solutions that align with business and technical requirements. Ability to integrate multiple technologies and platforms into cohesive, scalable architectures.
* **Consultative Selling:** Proven ability to advise customers, provide strategic recommendations, and navigate complex technical environments to deliver tailored solutions.
* **Strategic & Structured Facilitation:** Demonstrated experience capturing requirements, prioritising needs, identifying risks and constraints, and quantifying business value to support strategic outcomes.
* **AI Solution Design:** Experience designing, building, and deploying AI solutions across cloud and hybrid environments. Strong understanding of AI‑related Azure services, architecture patterns, migrations, and industry standards.
* **Relevant Certifications:** Certifications in applicable technologies or disciplines (e.g., Azure certifications).**Azure Certifications (Preferred):**
	+ AI‑102 Azure AI Engineer Associate
	+ PL‑600 Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
	+ Or other relevant certifications from recognised vendors.**Design Thinking:** Proven experience delivering design‑thinking workshops, ideation sessions, or problem‑framing engagements.
  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**

title: IT-Specialist Backend
description:
**Om oss**  

På Techrytera AB börjar rekryteringen med dig. Vi är ett bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag med spetskompetens och ett tydligt fokus inom IT och Engineering. Med vår branschkunskap och nära dialog med både kandidater och kunder skapar vi träffsäkra matchningar där rätt kompetens möter rätt behov.


Vi tror att en riktigt bra matchning inte bara handlar om en rollbeskrivning – utan om dina erfarenheter, din potential och vad du faktiskt vill utvecklas inom. Därför utgår vi alltid från individen. Genom att förstå din bakgrund, dina drivkrafter och dina ambitioner kan vi koppla ihop dig med uppdrag och roller hos våra kunder där du får rätt förutsättningar att utvecklas och göra skillnad.


Vårt mål är att bygga långsiktiga och meningsfulla samarbeten – både för dig som kandidat och för våra kunder.  

  

**Arbetsbeskrivning**  

Kunden behöver ett IT-system för hantering av uppgifter i säkerhetsskyddsklass. Systemet ska uppfylla relevanta lagar, föreskrifter och riktlinjer för säkerhetsskydd.


IT-systemet ska byggas, dokumenteras och samtliga ingående komponenter ska härdas. Därefter ska systemet genomgå säkerhetsgranskning, godkännas av kundens interna granskningsorganisation samt slutligen prövas av berörd tillsynsmyndighet.


En systemdesign finns redan framtagen. Uppdraget inleds med uppackning och montering av ingående hårdvara samt uppbyggnad av systemet enligt den befintliga systemdesignen i dialog med projektets lösningsarkitekt.


Uppdraget leds av projektets projektledare.

### **Genomförande**


Rollerna IT-specialist Windows, IT-specialist nätverk och IT-specialist backend kommer att genomföra arbetet i nära samarbete med varandra samt med projektets befintliga resurser, såsom projektledare, lösningsarkitekt och andra relevanta funktioner  

  

**Skallkrav**:  

1. · Konsulten ska ha erfarenhet av att bygga minst 2 VMware-baserade virtualiseringsmiljöer från grunden. Erfarenhet ska vara inom de senaste 7 åren.  

2. · Konsulten ska ha minst 3 års erfarenhet de senaste 7 åren från arbete med backuplösningar från Veeam eller motsvarande  

3. · Konsulten ska ha minst 3 års erfarenhet de senaste 7 åren från arbete med serverhårdvara från HPE, Dell eller motsvarande.  

4. · Konsulten ska ha erfarenhet från härdning av VMware-baserade virtualiserings-lösningar i minst 2 tidigare IT-system. Erfarenhet ska vara inom de senaste 7 åren.  

5. · Konsulten ska ha erfarenhet från att bygga VMware-lösningar klustrade med extern SAN-lagring tex Netapp eller motsvarande.  

6. Konsulten ska ha minst 3 års erfarenhet de senaste 7 åren från framtagning av dokumentation av rutiner, anvisningar och driftdokumentation  

7. · Konsulten ska ha erfarenhet under de senaste 7 åren från framtagning av ett system godkänt för hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassad information enligt OSL.  

  

**Börkrav**:  

1. Konsulten har tidigare erfarenhet av att jobba med Netapp  

2. Konsulten har tidigare erfarenhet av arbete med Zero klienter.  

3. Konsulten har tidigare erfarenhet av arbete med RÖS utrustning.  

  

Ansökan  

När du söker via Techrytera AB söker du inte bara ett jobb – du påbörjar en dialog om din fortsatta karriär. Vi vill lära känna dig, din erfarenhet och dina ambitioner för att kunna matcha dig med rätt möjligheter hos våra kunder.


Låter det intressant? Skicka in din ansökan eller hör av dig till oss så berättar vi mer. Vi ser fram emot att hitta nästa steg i din karriär tillsammans med dig.

title: Senior Product Manager
description:
**Stockholm | Full-time**
**The Mission**
 Enterprise AI is only as reliable as the knowledge it draws from. As organizations deploy AI agents, copilots, and automation at scale, they are discovering a hard truth: most enterprise knowledge is unstructured, ungoverned, and unfit for machines to trust.
   

  

**Paligo exists to solve this.** 
 We are a fast-growing SaaS scale-up (80+ people, 450+ customers across 38 countries) offering an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS). We enable global enterprises to create, manage, and deliver structured content where accuracy and governance are non-negotiable.
   

  

 Our ambition is to evolve from a documentation platform into the
 **structured content infrastructure** 
 that enterprises need to make AI trustworthy. We aren’t just bolting on AI features; we are evolving a mature, enterprise-grade platform to unlock entirely new categories of value. This requires uncommon product judgment.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are looking for a
 **Senior Product Manager** 
 who thrives on complex systems with real-world consequences. This is not a delivery coordination role. You will help shape the platform’s direction and own problems end-to-end, from discovery through to measurable impact. You will be expected to challenge assumptions, influence decisions across teams, and define what meaningful progress looks like for both our customers and Paligo.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Turn Platform Strengths into Customer Value: Extend Paligo’s structured content foundation in ways that create measurable impact, particularly within the emerging AI landscape.
* Identify the Right Problems: Deeply understand customer workflows and market dynamics. Translate these insights into clear problem definitions and opportunity spaces.
* Set Direction & Make Hard Trade-offs: Define clear outcomes and prioritize decisions that balance immediate customer needs with long-term platform integrity.
* Commercial Accountability: Own product-led growth and monetization outcomes (expansion, adoption, retention). Partner with Sales on deal strategy and contribute to pricing/packaging for new capabilities.
* Cross-functional Execution: Work closely with Engineering and Design to shape solutions, clarify trade-offs, and ensure high-quality delivery.
* Measure & Iterate: Define how we measure success. Track adoption and usage data to refine decisions and improve results over time.


**Must-haves**
**What You Bring**
* Senior PM Experience: 5+ years in B2B SaaS Product Management, owning a meaningful product area with measurable business impact.
* Product Judgment & Decision-Making: Demonstrated ability to define ambiguous problems, make independent product decisions, and deliver measurable business impact.
* AI Fluency: Hands-on experience prototyping and shipping AI-powered functionality in production environments. Comfortable experimenting with AI tooling and rapid iteration.
* Strategic Communication: Ability to define product value for executive buyers (CTO, VP IT, CIO) as well as practitioner users.
* Collaborative Spirit: Comfortable navigating Engineering, Design, Sales, and Customer Success teams.


**Nice-to-haves**
* Technical Depth: An understanding of how structured data supports retrieval systems (RAG, knowledge graphs, grounding) and enterprise AI use cases.
* Familiarity with structured content, knowledge management, or information architecture.


**How You Work**
 You make decisions in complex systems where every change has downstream consequences. You are at ease with ambiguity and don’t wait for perfect clarity to move forward. You focus on solving the right problems and explain your reasoning clearly. You are willing to challenge and be challenged, taking full responsibility for outcomes rather than just plans.
   

  

**Why Join Paligo?**
* A Pivotal Moment: Join us as we define how structured content becomes the backbone of enterprise AI—a category we believe is ours to shape.
* Real Impact: Your work directly influences how global enterprises prepare information for the next generation of automation.
* Grounded Culture: We value clarity, customer empathy, and substance over buzzwords.
* Flexible & Global: A collaborative, remote-friendly culture with a strong presence in Stockholm.
* Perks & Benefits: Competitive compensation, wellness allowance, professional development support, and of course, Swedish "fika" culture!


 Paligo is an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS) solution for technical documentation, policies and procedures, knowledge management, and more.

title: Project Officer
description:
We are looking for a Project Officer to support the coordination and delivery of ongoing projects within an international environment. The role focuses on assisting project teams in planning, monitoring, and reporting activities while ensuring effective communication between stakeholders and project members. This is a hybrid position based in Stockholm. The Project Officer will support project management activities, track project progress, and contribute to the smooth execution of project tasks and deliverables.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Support the planning, coordination, and execution of project activities
* Assist in monitoring project timelines, milestones, and deliverables
* Prepare project documentation, reports, and presentations
* Maintain project records and ensure proper documentation of activities
* Support communication and coordination between project stakeholders and team members
* Track project progress and assist in identifying potential risks or issues
* Organise project meetings, workshops, and follow-up actions
* Contribute to project reporting and status updates


**Requirements**
**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Project Management, or a related field
* 4+ years of experience in project coordination, project management support, or similar roles
* Understanding of project management principles and methodologies
* Experience preparing reports, documentation, and project updates
* Strong organisational and coordination skills
* Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills
* Fluency in English (spoken and written)


**You will be a great candidate for us if you**
* Are highly organised and detail-oriented
* Enjoy coordinating tasks and supporting project teams
* Can communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Are proactive and able to anticipate project needs
* Are comfortable working in a collaborative and dynamic environment


**Benefits**
**Why join inventYOU**
* Work in an international and collaborative environment
* Be part of diverse and impactful projects
* Develop your project management and coordination skills
* Collaborate with experienced professionals and project teams

title: Junior Associate - Tech & AI
description:
**Who You'll Work With**
 Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.
   

  

 In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.
   

  

 When you join us, you will have:
   

  

* Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
* A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
* Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
* World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.


**Your Impact**
 As a junior associate, you will join a client service team and take ownership of a workstream to solve some of the toughest challenges our clients face.
   

  

 Your clients aren’t just any clients, they're some of the most influential organizations around, from Fortune 500 giants to innovative startups. We will expect you to go the extra mile, delivering solutions that solve immediate problems and drive long-term change, and we’ll rely on your judgment and integrity to ensure our recommendations are effective and long-lasting.
   

  

 You will take on a role that goes beyond advising. You’ll be at the heart of the action—helping to uncover the true challenges behind a client’s strategy and creating actionable plans that drive real change. Working alongside clients and other McKinsey colleagues, you’ll combine research, analyzing data, interviews, and brainstorming to generate fresh insights and breakthrough solutions. Your commitment to our values will be crucial in earning our clients' trust and delivering results that matter.
   

  

 As you collaborate directly with clients, you’ll help them solve problems, refine strategies, and implement transformations. By equipping them with the tools and knowledge to continue innovating and improving after we’ve left, you’ll ensure the impact of our work endures. In doing so, you’ll uphold McKinsey’s commitment to making a meaningful difference in the industries and communities we serve.
   

  

 Our consultants within our Tech & AI practice help clients unlock the power of AI at scale, modernize technology delivery, and build new businesses to fuel growth.
   

  

**Your Qualifications and Skills**
**Read more about our work here.**
* Degree in technical subjects such as computer science, engineering, IT, hard sciences, physics or mathematics; advanced degree is a plus
* Excellent organizational capabilities, including the ability to initiate tasks independently and see them through to completion
* Proficient in rational decision making based on data, facts, and logical reasoning
* Ability to create work product-focused materials / outputs, which may include PowerPoint decks, Excel models, articles, or other written deliverables
* Exceptional time management to meet your responsibilities in a complex and largely autonomous work environment
* Ability to work or attend meetings outside of traditional business hours or take on projects with limited or no notice at times
* Ability to travel to and work in varying environments that may be challenging and/or not accessible (e.g., factories, hospitals, mines)
* Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, in English, with the ability to adjust your style to suit different perspectives and seniority levels

title: Business Analyst
System Engineer / Support Engineer
description:
Nordnet is a leading pan-Nordic digital platform for savings and investments. Ever since we started in 1996, our purpose has been to democratize savings and investments. Through innovation, simplicity, and transparency, we challenge traditional ways in the financial industry, and give private savers access to the same information, tools and services as professionals. Our ambition is to inspire, encourage and enable people to take their savings to the next level, no matter who they are.
   

  

*Help us transform the way people save and invest. Become a part of the journey to build an inspiring and innovative platform for savers and investors in the Nordics. Here's your opportunity!*
**In brief**
 We are looking for a Windows/Mac Client & System Engineer to join Nordnets IT Support department. We currently have 5 engineers working in the team and are now looking for one more, with mainly Windows competence.
   

  

 IT Support's mission is twofolded
   

  

* Provide prompt and effective assistance to Nordnet personnel with IT equipment and software-related inquiries and issues.
* Proactively maintain the integrity, functionality, and security of client devices, mobile phones, meeting room equipment, and associated software, ensuring adherence to Nordnet's stringent security standards.


 IT Operations is comprised of various teams, and you will collaborate closely with them to effectively manage problems and drive progress on ongoing initiatives and projects.
   

  

**This is you**
 Most likely, you have a technical background that enables you to understand IT services on a deeper level. You have a strong passion for customer satisfaction. You like to communicate, and you have a true interest in building relations and creating results through your team.
   

  

 You should have several years of experience working with Clients (Mac/Win & Mobiles).
   

  

 Good knowledge of
   

  

* SCCM
* Intune
* Azure
* Jamf
* Google workspace


 You communicate fluently in both Swedish and English and have an open mindset and a can-do attitude. Getting to know the details and understanding how everything is connected and dependent on each other is of great importance to you. You’re not afraid of rolling up your sleeves and love working in a fast-paced environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Client OS Configuration and deployment of Clients (Win/Mac & Mobile).
* Provide technical support to users and troubleshoot problems related to these clients.
* Deploy and manage software updates
* Troubleshoot hardware and software problems
* Document system configurations and procedures


 Former experience within Client OS Configuration is considered a huge advantage.
   

  

**About Nordnetters**
 We value experimentation and continuous improvement. With an impartial approach, we welcome new ideas to boost our progress. Sharing knowledge and learning from our setbacks is part of the game. We have the courage to ask questions and admit that we do not have the answer, all the time. We believe that straightforward and transparent communication build trust and inclusion.
   

  

 Culture is built and cared for, each day by everyone. We’re proud of ours. Having a flat organization where anyone can talk to anyone creates a warm and friendly atmosphere worth protecting. We believe in a culture where every effort counts and where everyone is being recognized. A culture embracing our core values – passion, simplicity and transparency on all levels, no matter who you are or what you do.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 We offer you the opportunity to work in a Nordic environment focused on innovation, product development, and technology. We are accelerating, renewing ourselves, and building the best platform for savings and investments. Our ambitions are high, and you will join a fast-paced and challenging journey alongside a fantastic team of sharp and dedicated colleagues. There is great potential for development here, as well as opportunities to be part of the journey towards becoming the first choice among Nordic savers.
   

  

 We are 900 employees in Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki and Copenhagen.
   

  

 You can also visit us on: www.nordnet.se, www.nordnet.no, www.nordnet.dk and www.nordnet.fi.
   

  

**Application**
 If you have questions, please contact Head of IT Support, Patrik Axelsson, patrik.axelsson@nordnet.se or Talent Acquisition Partner, Alva Hellberg, alva.hellberg@nordnet.se.
   

  

 Apply today– we will start interviewing immediately. Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 We want to inform you that Nordnet conducts mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing as a part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!

title: IT Consultant - Stockholm | BCG Platinion
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Do you want to turn the challenges of digitalization into the solutions of the future? Join BCG Platinion in tackling the core IT issues of leading global companies. Deploy customized platforms, architectures, strategies, and organizations to leverage the digital potential of our customers and drive true innovation, with state-of-the-art tools such as cloud computing, AI, blockchain, microservices, and containerization. Add your individual strengths to our unique team, always there to support you. Together with Boston Consulting Group and our clients, we turn digital visions into reality.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 For our Stockholm office, we are looking for IT Consultants who will collaborate with colleagues from BCG Platinion and/or the Boston Consulting Group on local and international client projects!
   

  

 What You'll Bring
   

  

**You can help us make a difference if you**
* have a degree in computer science, informatics, business with focus on IT, or a related field
* gathered approx. two years of relevant experience in IT consulting (part or full time)
* are no stranger to the buzzwords machine learning, cyber resilience, DevOps, agile, AI, and robotics
* enjoy tackling complex digital challenges and are enthusiastic about developing and sharing solutions
* feel comfortable in interdisciplinary teams and global contexts and are flexible and willing to travel
* are excellent at understanding and communicating complex topics in English


 Who You'll Work With
   

  

**Shape the world of tomorrow**
* Shape the digital future of globally leading companies in an individual client context with overarching technical solutions
* Develop groundbreaking projects by enabling your clients to effectively use agile methods and modern approaches in the context of strategic IT implementation
* Smooth the path for tailored, future-oriented customer journeys based on precise analyses of the individual situation and with current market developments and trends such as machine learning in mind
* Design and optimize unique IT architectures within the framework of enterprise solution requirements, modern custom software developments, and sustainable digital solutions, including cyber resilience


 Additional info
   

  

**How To Grow With Us**
 We guarantee constant development incentives in an open and rewarding work environment! Together with a dedicated team of talented colleagues, you get to work on new challenges every day. Individual training offers and a culture of open feedback will provide the framework needed to explore and perfect personal strengths. Our modern structures allow focusing on the essence of our work - with easy travel booking, an excellent back-office support and comprehensive Knowledge Center. With our regular office Fridays and legendary events, we nurture a strong and close team network beyond our case work.

title: Systemutvecklare
description:
I rollen som konsult hos oss får du ett omväxlande jobb med en mängd olika arbetsuppgifter. Du kommer erbjudas konsultuppdrag där du snabbt utvecklar din egen kompetens och kunskap inom relevanta områden. Våra kunder är främst medelstora och stora bolag med spännande miljöer i teknisk framkant.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som har några års erfarenhet inom området. Vi ser gärna att du har högskole- eller civilingenjörsexamen inom exempelvis datateknik, programmering eller motsvarande.
   

  

 Vilket programmeringsspråk du har kunskaper i är sekundärt, men vi tror att du har ett par språk som du är extra förtjust i. Du kan exempelvis ha allmänt goda kunskaper inom något av programmeringsspråken C, C++, Python och/eller Java. Du ska ha god förståelse för agila utvecklingsmetoder, exempelvis Scrum. Du ska även ha goda kunskaper i både svenska och engelska i såväl tal som skrift.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som, precis som vi, har ett stort tekniskt intresse och drivs av att arbeta med ny teknik och att hänga med i branschens utveckling. Att du gillar att koda och att hitta lösningar på problem är för dig en självklarhet. Som person är du analytiskt lagd, har ett stort initiativtagande, gillar att arbeta systematiskt och har båda fötterna på jorden. I ditt arbete som konsult läggs stor vikt på att kunna samarbeta med andra på ett konstruktivt sätt och att kunna leverera projekt på utsatt tid.
   

  

**Du kommunicerar dagligen både skriftligt och muntligt på svenska och engelska varför det är ett krav att du behärskar båda språken väl.**
**Befattningen kan komma att kräva att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tids gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där krav finns på säkerhetsklassinplacering, kan i förekommande fall, medföras krav på visst medborgarskap.**
**Vilka är vi?**
 SysPartner erbjuder konsultation inom infrastruktur och systemutveckling samt hostinglösningar och helhetskoncept för IT-drift. Vi grundades i Linköping 2005 och har sedan dess expanderat till ytterligare fyra städer, och vi finns idag även i Stockholm, Västerås, Luleå och Göteborg.
   

  

 SysPartner strävar efter att vara det lilla familjära företaget samtidigt som våra konsulter ofta får chansen att arbeta i en större organisation med spännande tekniska lösningar. SysPartner lägger stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper och vad du själv kan inbringa till företaget. Att ta med sig sina personliga intressen till arbetsplatsen är mer än uppskattat! Du kommer som medarbetare att få ta del av givmilda personalförmåner och få vara delaktig i en mängd sociala aktiviteter som ordnas av företaget årligen.
   

  

 Blir du nyfiken? Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Brand Designer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We're looking for a world-class brand designer to help define and evolve Lovable's visual identity. You'll contribute to our brand across all touchpoints, creating assets for web, print, and motion. We expect exceptional taste, versatility across mediums, and the ability to maintain consistency in a fast-paced environment. You'll join a team at the forefront of AI, enabling anyone to create software.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we're just getting started.
   

  

 We're a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, move fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
* Experience designing for web, print, and motion across high-growth startup environments
* A portfolio of shipped brand assets - campaign visuals, social graphics, presentation decks, event materials, and marketing collateral
* Strong craft across brand identity, typography, layout, and illustration with demonstrable output
* Proven ability to maintain brand consistency while delivering high volumes of work across multiple channels
* Experience creating scalable brand systems, templates, and guidelines that enable teams to execute independently
* Ability to work autonomously and manage multiple concurrent projects from brief to delivery


**What You'll Do**
 In one sentence: Shape how the world sees and experiences Lovable.
   

  

* Own and evolve Lovable's visual identity system across all brand touchpoints
* Create marketing assets for campaigns, social media, events, and partnerships
* Design presentation decks, one-pagers, and sales materials that tell our story compellingly
* Establish brand guidelines and systems that ensure consistency as we scale rapidly
* Build tools, templates, and processes that empower the team to create on-brand work independently
* Collaborate with product design to ensure brand consistency within the product experience
* Work with content and growth teams to bring campaigns to life visually
* Be scrappy and hands-on with whatever the brand needs - from a LinkedIn carousel to event signage
* Help set the bar for creative quality and taste at Lovable


**How We Hire**
* Fill in a short form then jump on an initial exploratory call.
* We'll send you a quick take-home asking to present your best work over a loom video presentation.
* Join us for a round of interviews to discuss your experience in more depth
* Join us for trial work lasting 1-2 days remote or on-site. We'll see how you tick and you get to meet the team and explore whether joining Lovable feels right for you.


**Important Note:**
* Please submit your application in English. It's our company language so you'll be speaking lots of it if you join.
* We treat all candidates equally - if you're interested please apply through our careers portal.

title: L2 Support Engineer for Telecom OSS Fulfilment & Inventory (Strucware, Wildfly)
description:
**About the job** 




  





**Role:** 
 L2 Support Engineer for Telecom OSS Fulfilment & Inventory (Strucware, Wildfly)
 



**Experience:** 
 6+ Years
 



**Language requirements:** 
 Swedish + English
 



  





**Tata consultancy Services** 
 is an IT services, consulting and business solutions organization that has been partnering with many of the world’s largest businesses for the past 50 years. We believe innovation and collective knowledge can transform all our futures with greater purpose. We help companies across industries achieve their strategic goals and lead their digital transformation programs. With 600,000 experts globally and 18,000+ consultants working for leading Nordic Customers, we have a strong sense of purpose for the ecosystem around us – our employees, partners, customers and society.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




  





 Join a high-performing telecom engineering team as a DevOps Engineer, where you will drive CI/CD automation, infrastructure modernization, and operational excellence across BSS/OSS systems. You will work on large-scale telecom platforms including billing, CRM, provisioning, and network management while enabling faster releases, high availability, and resilient operations. This role offers deep exposure to Kubernetes, cloud environments, automation frameworks, monitoring tools, and multi-vendor telecom ecosystems in an Agile and DevOps-driven environment.
 



  





**Key Job Responsibilities:** 




  




* Monitor application health (WildFly services, legacy daemons, job schedulers); triage incidents, perform Root Cause Analysis, apply workarounds/hotfixes, and update KEDB and runbooks.
* Support order-to-activate steps: resource assignment, capacity checks, reservation, activation triggers, and post-activation verification
* Validate inventory updates from planning/RLC (resource/circuit/device/site changes) and reconcile mismatches that affect service delivery.
* Implement fixes in Java (backend services, adapters), C (legacy utilities/daemons), and GWT (UI behaviours) following coding and testing standards.
* Operate WildFly app servers (datasources, JVM tuning, thread/connection pools), manage configuration, logs, and rolling restarts.
* Maintain topology integrity and referential links (service–resource–device–location).
* Support and monitor REST/SOAP interfaces to OSS/BSS (Order Management, Assurance/NMS, ITSM/CRM); ensure idempotency, retries/backoff, and error handling.



  





**Experience & Skills Requirements:** 




  





**Must have:** 



* Telecom OSS Fulfilment & Inventory domain knowledge: O2A process touchpoints, resource/service modeling, capacity/reservation, activation, and fall‑out handling.
* Hands‑on with WildFly (JBoss) administration and Java EE application support.
* Java (services/adapters), C (utilities/daemons), GWT (legacy UI) for minor fixes and triage.
* SQL proficiency (query tuning, troubleshooting data inconsistencies) on the platform’s database(s).
* Integration patterns (REST/SOAP), error handling, retries/backoff, and idempotency.
* ITIL L2 support: incident lifecycle, RCA authoring, problem records, change/CAB governance.
* Linux/Unix operations, shell scripting, log analysis, and performance profiling.



  





**Good to have:** 



* Familiarity with TM Forum frameworks (SID, eTOM, ODA) and service catalogue concepts.
* Exposure to Assurance/NMS (for closed‑loop validations post‑activation).
* Observability stack (Elastic/Kibana/Grafana/Prometheus) for building basic dashboards.
* CI/CD awareness (Jenkins/GitHub Actions/Azure DevOps) for configuration‑as‑code and repeatable deployments.
* Experience onboarding replacement/migration components to reduce legacy risk.



  





**Success Metrics & Unique Selling Proposition (USP) of The Role:** 




  




* Faster and more reliable software delivery through automated CI/CD and containerized deployments.
* Improved system stability, uptime, and SLA performance in large-scale telecom environments.
* Strong impact on cost reduction and operational efficiency through automation and infrastructure-as-code.
* Ability to lead modernization of BSS/OSS platforms using Kubernetes, cloud, and advanced monitoring tools.
* Act as a key driver connecting development, operations, and architecture teams for DevOps excellence.



  





**What we offer / What’s in it for you:** 




  




* Opportunity to work on large-scale telecom platforms with modern DevOps and automation technologies.
* Exposure to cloud, Kubernetes, monitoring ecosystems, and next-gen BSS/OSS modernization initiatives.
* Collaborative environment with cross-functional and global engineering teams.
* Continuous learning and career growth supported by certifications and complex project exposure.
* Ownership of strategic DevOps initiatives with direct impact on operational performance and delivery speed.



  





**Does that sound interesting?** 




  





 You are welcome to submit your application consisting of your CV, personal letter, relevant degrees or certifications details, professional references, etc. We work with ongoing recruitment so send in your application as soon as possible.
 



  





 We look forward to receiving your application via LinkedIn or mail to
 **aswini.ranganathan@tcs.com**

title: Solution Engineer - Innovation Hub
description:
**Overview**
**Microsoft Innovation Hub** 
 empowers customers to overcome their business challenges through innovative engagements that integrate multiple areas of expertise. We drive AI transformation by leveraging evolving needs and emerging business opportunities. As the future of technologists and enterprise technical sellers, we guide customers from envisioning solutions to implementation. We deliver the Microsoft value story through immersive experiences, strengthening customer trust through deep engagements in exceptional environments.
   

  

 As a
 **Solution Engineer in the Microsoft Innovation Hub** 
 , you will merge business and technical requirements to craft comprehensive solutions, working seamlessly with various stakeholders. You will conduct discovery sessions to understand customer needs and provide strategic recommendations and best practices tailored to their specific needs. Implementing robust AI transformation solutions and optimizing the integration of various technologies and services will be key aspects of your role. Additionally, you will leverage consultancy skills to foster collaboration among technical resources and stakeholders, ensuring alignment and effective teamwork. This role is Microsoft onsite only.
   

  

 Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Delivering customer engagements: Prepare and deliver technical engagements including strategy sessions, envisioning workshops, architecture design sessions and rapid prototyping to demonstrate key capabilities, validate against identified risks and finalize technology choices.
* AI Transformation Leadership: Be the trusted voice within the business and for customers on the latest AI platform and technology trends, guiding their transformation journeys. By prioritizing AI use cases through design thinking workshops, you will lead these journeys effectively. You will be a valued contributor to Microsoft’s strategy in your area, ensuring the Hub is proactively aligned with the right customers to drive real impact.
* Strategic Vision and Planning: Own and execute a clear strategic vision for AI transformation initiatives on a set of targeted accounts, aligning with organizational goals and customer needs by collaborating and orchestrating cross-functional teams.
* Solution Design and Architecture: Develop comprehensive solution architectures based on patterns and practices that are tied to customer requirements and ensure that solutions are scalable, secure and optimized for performance. By utilizing consultation skills, you will uncover and prioritize opportunities, ensuing solutions are addressing real customer needs.
* Cross Platform Collaboration: Adopt a holistic approach to integrate capabilities across the entire cloud platform, identifying synergies and optimizing cross-platform integration. You will work with your peers and stakeholders to make the Innovation Hub the home of Cross Solution AI Transformation.
* Technical Depth: Maintain and grow expertise in creating business value on top of the business applications including sales, services and marketing and Microsoft 365 platform to support AI transformation initiatives. Stay updated with the market trends and collaborate with the technical communities.
* Technical Sales and Sales Leadership: Act as a strategic change agent within the business to shape Microsoft's programs and engineering offerings. Lead the creation of scalable, field-relevant assets through internal communities. Champion Hub engagement success by connecting technical capabilities to sales opportunities and serving as a trusted voice with sales leaders and account teams.


**Qualifications**
**Required:**
* Master’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field OR Bachelor’s Degree in a related field OR equivalent hands-on experience.
* Several years of experience in technical pre‑sales, technical consulting, or a similar customer‑facing technical role.
* Fluency in Swedish and English.


**Preferred Qualifications** 
**Design Thinking:** 
 Proven experience delivering design‑thinking workshops, ideation sessions, or problem‑framing engagements.
   

  

* Enterprise Architecture: Proven experience designing and delivering large‑scale, complex solutions that align with business and technical requirements. Ability to integrate multiple technologies and platforms into cohesive, scalable architectures.
* Consultative Selling: Proven ability to advise customers, provide strategic recommendations, and navigate complex technical environments to deliver tailored solutions.
* Strategic & Structured Facilitation: Demonstrated experience capturing requirements, prioritising needs, identifying risks and constraints, and quantifying business value to support strategic outcomes.
* AI Solution Design: Experience designing, building, and deploying AI solutions across cloud and hybrid environments. Strong understanding of AI‑related Azure services, architecture patterns, migrations, and industry standards.
* Relevant Certifications: Certifications in applicable technologies or disciplines (e.g., Azure certifications).Azure Certifications (Preferred):
+ AI‑102 Azure AI Engineer Associate
+ PL‑600 Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
+ Or other relevant certifications from recognised vendors.


 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

title: Senior Product Manager-Tech
description:
At Betsson Group, the Player Rewards and Gamification Area ensures our customers come back for more! It’s all about loyalty. We provide a world class customer experience beyond the game play featuring exciting features like tournament, dynamic personalised campaigns and much more! We also work closely with our Commercial, Compliance and Data teams to build the next generation back-office tools to support their processes.
 


**The Wow** 

 As our Senior Product Manager, you will be a part of a cross functional development team where you will have the primary responsibility for defining, organising and prioritising requirements. You will work closely with business stakeholders within the organisation, as well as developers, architects and UX designers to continuously optimise the customer experience.
 



 Together with your team you will take ownership of a number of customer journeys and/or capabilities where you will be one of the key people expected to drive and lead the delivery of new functionality as well as improvements of existing functionality. This will often require you to collaborate with other development teams and engage with a number of stakeholders to ensure a successful roll out. We operate in a fast paced and challenging industry, and you will have several opportunities to work on complex and cutting edge products and contribute to Betsson Group’s success.
 



  
 


**A taster of what you will be involved with** 
* Proactively get input from relevant Business Units on operational needs and problems that need to be solved
* Align requirements, scope, and plan with company-wide initiatives
* Conduct competitors’ analysis
* Lead User Research, experimentation, A/B testing, UAT initiatives
* Own Product Roadmap and prioritization
* Set and track Product KPIs and Success Metrics for product deliveries
* Communicate iteratively on Roadmap changes and deliveries
* Working with UX and UI designers (and other stakeholders as necessary) to define the customer experience and product specifications
* Defining user stories with acceptance criteria together with the development team
* Defining tracking, reporting, and non-functional requirements for user stories
* Working with the team to refine, plan and prioritise user stories according to business value, always taking technical debt and the long term success of the product into account
* Collaborating with stakeholders and ensuring that they are kept up to date and aligned with the current progress and prioritization
* Helping the rest of the development team and Product Management peers to ensure that acceptance criteria are met
* Occasional travelling be required to our various offices



  
 


**What we are looking for** 
* Prior software engineering experience or education.
* Collaboration and dialogue. You will be collaborating both with members of your development team, stakeholders outside the team as well as third party providers and partners
* Agile. Not just processes but a true agile mind-set where all members of the cross functional development team are involved and where changing requirements based on business needs and market opportunities are embraced
* Facilitating and creating workshops materials
* Prioritizing and taking educated decisions
* Collaborating with development teams
* Problem solving and tough conversations. We work in a high paced industry and having more requirements and expectations than capacity is the norm. You will play a key role in managing expectations and ensuring a sustainable pace in your team.
* You are technical enough to manage software product – backend, back-office, and player-facing features for the enterprise platform
* Understanding of APIs, SQL, event-based services and various API exploration tools, like Postman, Swagger, LINQ Pad or similar is a must due to most of functionality is in the backend and API, with limited exposure to UI
* Transactional business rules and algorithmic thinking
* Defining observability, logging requirements, coming up with metrics, alerts ad defining deviations from normal performance of the system.
* Good understanding and ability to define non-functional requirements is a must
* Analysing legal and regulatory requirements
* Product Discovery, Product Planning, and delivery tools (like Jira, Confluence, Miro or similar)
* Thorough documentation of decisions, requirements, analysis and dependencies
* Creating audience-specific presentations and workshop materials
* Gaming, Payments, Revenue Recognition and Accounting, Taxation, CRM, SAAS experience is a big plus



  
 


**What we offer** 

 Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
**Would you like to become a part of the World Of Red Bull?** 
 Do you naturally come up with creative, entertaining video ideas and know how to turn them into content people actually want to watch, share, and engage with?
   

  

 As a
 **Social Media Specialist** 
 , you help fuel the engine behind Red Bull Sweden’s digital content strategy. You’re an expert in your field — plugged into trends, platform mechanics, and user behavior, and you know what it takes to create content that cuts through.
   

  

 Based in Stockholm, your mission is to manage and grow our social media channels, activating everything from Red Bull events and sponsored athletes to live broadcasts, films, editorial content, and digital consumer activations. In short: you bring the brand to life where our audience is.
   

  

 Ready to take on the role of Social Media Specialist for one of the world’s strongest brands? Apply today — selection is ongoing.
   

  

**All the responsibilities we'll trust you with:**
**CONTENT CREATION**
 By proactively developing your own creative content initiatives, while also leveraging both local and global content opportunities, you use your creativity and video editing skills to ensure our channels are filled with engaging, up-to-date, and tailor-made video content that truly represents the brand.
   

  

**ORGANIC REACH**
 You create innovative, wow-worthy ideas to activate our athletes and events, and know exactly how to turn them into organic viral moments that people actually care about. And no — we don’t do paid ads.
   

  

**COMMUNITY MANAGEMENT**
 You proactively strengthen Red Bull’s presence through community management — driving engagement, answering questions, and keeping conversations alive with both consumers and social opinion leaders to build deeper interest in the brand.
   

  

**ANALYSIS & TREND MONITORING**
 To continuously optimize Red Bull Sweden’s communication, you identify, analyze, and adapt content in line with the latest digital trends. You stay ahead by tracking emerging technologies and spotting new opportunities to leverage them. Through insights from audience data, market research, and analytics tools, you actively shape and evolve our content strategy.
   

  

**Your areas of knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:**
* Excellent film production and video editing skills. Experience with DaVinci Resolve is a strong plus.
* 2–3 years of experience in a similar role, building brands in social — both from a project management and creative perspective.
* A strong understanding of how content travels across social platforms, and how to maximize reach, relevance, and engagement.
* Fluent in spoken and written Swedish and English, with strong communication and collaboration skills.
* A genuine personal interest in areas such as extreme sports, gaming, motorsport, or music.


 Red Bull Sweden AB is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We welcome applications from all members of society irrespective of age, sex, disability, sexual orientation, race, religion.

* Strong understanding of SAP business processes, digital transformation, and cloud/infrastructure domains.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

**Preferred Attributes** 




  




* Experience working with global clients in sectors such as Manufacturing, Telecom, BFSI, or Retail.
* Exposure to AI-led platforms, automation, and hybrid cloud solutions.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple bids simultaneously.
* Willingness to travel for client workshops or solution presentations.
* Experience in global delivery models and multicultural environments.



  





**Does that sound interesting?**
