title: Service Technician
description:
Your Job Tasks
   

  

 We offer a stimulating work environment where you will have the opportunity to handle a variety of tasks, including servicing, troubleshooting, and repairing cranes and hooklifts. Perform preventive maintenance and communicate mechanical issuies with customers.
   

  

 As a service technician, you will work both in teams and independently on tasks related to service, repairs, and maintenance. It is essential that you are responsible, solution-oriented, and flexible
   

  

**Your Qualifications**
 We look forward to working with someone who has prior experience in workshop and service operations and possesses solid knowledge of electronics, mechanics, hydraulics, troubleshooting diagnostics
   

  

 At Palfinger, you will work in a dynamic environment where customer interaction is a key part of your responsibilities. Therefore, it is important that you are outgoing and enjoy providing excellent service.
   

  

 Proficiency in English is desirable since the role involves direct communication with our factories abroad.
   

  

 What we offer
   

  

 We provide exciting and challenging workdays with excellent opportunities for personal development. Additionally, we offer competitive salaries and health insurance. Our company places significant emphasis on workplace safety, employee satisfaction, and overall well-being.
   

  

 During your employment, we offer continuous training to help you grow in your career field, along with job security and excellent benefits.
   

  

 This is a full-time position.
   

  

 Welcome to Palfinger—we look forward to having you on our team!
   

  

 Are you interested in the position and still have questions? Please do not hesitate to contact us.

title: Senior Security Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced and driven Senior Security Specialist to join our Security Assurance & Compliance Management team. In this role, you will help strengthen and evolve our security posture across a rapidly changing telecom landscape. You will work closely with cross-functional teams, providing expert guidance on secure architecture, risk mitigation, and industry-leading best practices.
   

  

 As a Senior Security Specialist, you will support both strategic and operational security initiatives, with a primary focus on mobile core network environments, while also covering broader telecom domains such as RAN, Transport, OSS, and Telco Cloud.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 You will drive and support security initiatives across mobile core and broader telecom domains, ensuring robust and resilient telecom operations through expert assessments, governance, and collaboration.
   

  

* Drive and support security initiatives across mobile core and broader telecom domains, including security assessments
* Provide expert input on secure architectural designs, technology decisions, and conduct risk assessments, threat modelling, and security reviews
* Support sourcing with security requirements (primarily ISO 27000 alignment), perform supplier security audits, and represent the security function in internal and external forums
* Provide expert support across the organization on security matters related to Virtualization, Operating Systems, Applications, Networking, Architecture, Telia Policies, Encryption, Access Controls, and Backup, including support in handling and resolving security incidents, investigations etc.


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 You bring strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, excellent communication skills with the ability to simplify complex security topics, and a collaborative, proactive, solution-oriented approach. You are able to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and collaborate effectively with other security experts and cross-functional teams including Network, IT, Legal, Privacy, and Operations.
   

  

* 7+ years of experience in the Telecom Industry, preferably with a strong background in mobile core networks and telco cloud
* Proven track record within Security, including operational and/or architectural contributions
* Security Certified Auditor credential (CISA, CISSP) or equivalent security certification
* Architectural understanding of telecom environments, including interfaces, protocols, and end-to-end ecosystem interactions
* Solid knowledge in IT technologies, including networking, infrastructure, virtualization, and cloud native concepts
* Technical degree (Engineering, Computer Science, Telecommunications, or similar) and relevant certifications such as CISSP.


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a
 **Leading Telecommunications Operator** 
 &
 **Climate Leader** 
 , we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world. Here, you can
 **grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment.** 
 Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**For Lithuanian applicants only: monthly salary range for this position is from 4300 to 6400 EUR (gross) + annual performance bonuses** 
 . Although it may vary depending on your skills and experience.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **2026-03-20.** 
 Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our Hiring Manager/Talent Acquisition Partner. Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.
   

  

**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: Android Engineer - Platform Engineering
description:
Client Platform is an R&D studio that empowers hundreds of client developers to work efficiently on performance and stability in the Spotify apps, ultimately enabling them to deliver an awesome experience to Spotify users.
   

  

 We make this happen by providing observability and tools that collect performance and stability measurements and data, serving it to the feature squads in a clear and actionable way. We collaborate closely with our internal customers to understand needs and build a platform that fits. At times, we team up directly with feature squads to integrate our tooling and use it to identify and implement improvements directly in the app.
   

  

 Right now we are working on our next generation observability platform, which will gather different observations from the clients into one view, enabling engineers to understand what is happening at any given time, to find bottlenecks and better act on bugs and regressions.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Develop tooling for measuring and acting on quality and stability related issues
* Work across the stack, including gathering the right information in the Android client, processing and aggregating the data in the backend, and presenting it in Backstage.
* Occasionally perform deep-dive Android profiling, including system tracing, memory analysis, and app startup optimization, to identify and resolve performance bottlenecks.
* Act as an expert of quality and performance, and proactively find opportunities to improve awareness, attribution, and actionability of quality issues.
* Become a developer advocate improving technical communications with client developers within Spotify and foster a deeper understanding to their problems and needs.
* Innovate at a high pace to support development at scale.


 Who You Are
   

  

* Experienced Software Engineer, specialising in Android development, and are open to working across different platforms.
* You have experience in designing and building distributed services in Java/Kotlin.
* You are familiar with agile practices, testing methodologies, and CI/CD.
* You are comfortable working with BQ, data analysis, and SQL queries in order to make data-driven decisions.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Consulting Field Solutions Architect, Nordics
description:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.
   

  

 This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
   

  

 Since our founding,
 **Pure Storage** 
 has empowered innovators to build a better world with data. We’re transforming enterprise storage with simplicity, resilience, and sustainable performance. We’re a team that values learning, collaboration, and customer outcomes. Because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer perks that support balance and growth, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and community engagement.
   

  

 We also bring unique strengths to customers: a unified AIOps platform with
 **Pure1** 
 , a modern storage consumption model with
 **Evergreen//One** 
 (including industry-first SLAs such as Energy Efficiency and Ransomware Recovery), and proven sustainability and reliability advantages—along with the highest Net Promoter Score in our industry.
   

  

 The
 **Field Solutions Architect (FSA)** 
 is a pivotal technical go-to-market role at the intersection of
 **Cyber Resiliency** 
 ,
 **Unstructured Data** 
 ,
 **AI and Analytics** 
 , and
 **File & Object Storage** 
 . You’ll partner closely with Sales, Solutions, Alliances, Marketing, Engineering, and Enablement to guide strategy, create enablement, and support customers and partners in modern data environments. You’ll help teams qualify, position, and win Data Protection and Cyber Resiliency opportunities—spanning backup, disaster recovery, ransomware recovery, Kubernetes data protection, data mobility, and layered resiliency models—while maintaining deep technical expertise and translating platform capabilities into outcomes.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Create field-facing solutions content (technical walkthroughs, deep dives, demos, qualification guides, competitive guidance) for Data Protection, Unstructured Data, AI/Analytics, and File & Object Storage use cases, including backup and restore, DR/BC, ransomware/cyber recovery, archival/tiering, hybrid/multi-cloud protection, and large-scale data management.
* Build and launch enablement for early-stage Cyber Resiliency qualification (e.g., playbooks, discovery templates) aligned to specific customer outcomes.
* Develop strategies and patterns for integrating Pure solutions with unstructured data, AI, and analytics platforms; demonstrate value in complex data ecosystems.
* Provide guidance for file and object storage deployment, management, and optimisation best practices.
* Deliver webinars and event presentations (internal and external) with Alliance Partners, Channel Partners, and ecosystem vendors across backup/DR.
* Join customer calls, demos, POCs, EBCs, and strategy/sizing sessions to accelerate pipeline and deal progression.
* Maintain expertise in Pure’s platform portfolio; translate features (e.g., immutable snapshots, replication, rapid restore, container backup, disaster recovery) into concrete enablement plans.
* Stay current on emerging unstructured data, AI/analytics, and file/object innovations; turn insights into actionable field guidance.
* Influence the Solutions roadmap by capturing field feedback on patterns, blockers, and competitive dynamics in partnership with Product Management.
* Lead or oversee field testing of integrations and reference architectures; document best practices to bridge gaps ahead of formal validation.
* Provide post-sales assistance and troubleshooting around backup integrations, snapshot/replication workflows, cyber recovery runbooks, and DR orchestration patterns.
* Partner with Sales Leaders for two-way feedback, elevating regional strategy and execution for Data Protection.
* Drive cross-functional alignment on campaigns, content, and KPIs; connect teams and build strong internal relationships across Pure.


**What You’ll Bring**
* Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data/Computer Engineering, or related field—or equivalent practical experience.
* Typically 8+ years of pre-sales experience in IT, with depth in Data Protection (backup/restore, DR, cyber resilience, related architectures). Familiarity with Unstructured Data, AI/Analytics, and File & Object Storage is a plus.
* Typically 5+ years in IT or cloud infrastructure spanning compute, storage, networking, and distributed systems.
* Technical acumen across Data Protection: immutable snapshots, replication, DR runbooks/orchestration, ransomware recovery design, and cloud-based protection patterns.
* Understanding of the infrastructure underpinning high-performance recovery at scale (servers, networking, storage) and how to optimise RPO/RTO across on‑prem and cloud.
* Ability to map customer requirements to architectures and outcomes, and to simplify complex concepts for account teams and partners.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to present and explain visually (e.g., diagramming/whiteboarding) to diverse audiences.
* Proficiency with productivity tools and CRM/opportunity management systems (e.g., Google Workspace, Salesforce).
* Experience with the Data Protection ecosystem and Pure integrations: Veeam, Commvault, Veritas NetBackup, Cohesity, Rubrik, Zerto, VMware, Oracle RMAN, Microsoft SQL Server, SAP HANA, and Kubernetes ecosystems (e.g., Portworx, Kasten) across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
* Experience supporting large Enterprise and Public Sector/SLED accounts.
* Willingness to travel within the assigned territory (and occasionally internationally), approximately 40–60%, with variability by quarter and event cadence; reasonable accommodations considered.
* Reliable follow-through and accountability; community contributions (publications, talks, OSS) are a plus.
* Relevant certifications are a plus (e.g., VMCE, Commvault, AWS/Azure/GCP Architect, Kubernetes/CKA, security/cyber resiliency).


**What You Can Expect From Us**
* Innovation: We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
* Growth: We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
* Team: We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.


 And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company-sponsored team events. Check out purebenefits.com for more information.
   

  

**Accommodations And Accessibility**
 Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at TA-Ops@purestorage.com if you’re invited to an interview.
   

  

**Our Commitment To a Strong And Inclusive Team**
 We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.
   

  

 Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or any other characteristic legally protected by the laws of the jurisdiction in which you are being considered for hire.
   

  

**Join us and bring your best.**
**Bring your bold.**
**Pure and simple.**

title: Head of Social Media and Audiovisual Division - based in Luxembourg
description:
**This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence.** 
 The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support. The
 **EIB** 
 , the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for its Secretariat General Directorate, Communication Department, Social Media and Audiovisual Division\* at its headquarters in Luxembourg, a
 ****Head of Social Media and Audiovisual Division\*****
**\*.**
**This is a full-time position at grade 7 for which the EIB offers a permanent contract.**
* new Division following Directorate upcoming reorganisation
* internal benchmark Division Head Corporate Communication


*Applicants will receive an initial feedback in April 2026.*
*Assessment Centres for selected applicants would take place by first half of May 2026.*
*Panel interviews are anticipated for June 2026.*
 Purpose
   

  

 The Social Media and Audiovisual Division is a newly created division within the EIB Group’s Communication Department. As Head of the Social Media and Audiovisual Division, you define and steer the strategic direction, corporate standards and governance of the Group’s social media presence and audiovisual output across all platforms, ensuring alignment with institutional priorities, consistency of voice, quality, coherence and impact. You are responsible for ensuring that social and audiovisual content reflects the institution’s values, priorities, and high standards, and supports the visibility of senior leadership.
   

  

 You oversee the planning, creation, and delivery of compelling, high‑quality social media and audiovisual content ranging from project stories to announcements and event coverage, from short‑form social videos to long‑form video storytelling. You ensure all content is optimised for targeted audience engagement, cross‑channel alignment, and strategic visibility. You identify and test new platforms and features. You plan and deliver paid social campaigns as appropriate. You use AI‑powered tools and data‑driven optimisation techniques to maximise and measure audience reach. You provide direction to a multidisciplinary team of social media strategists and videographers.
   

  

 This leadership role requires proven social media management and storytelling expertise, editorial and political sensitivity, and the ability to guide in‑house specialists toward excellence in social media and audiovisual output. It requires in-depth experience in building engagement among specific, clearly defined audience groups. It calls for the ability to innovate across formats ranging from rapid‑turnaround social assets to high‑end audiovisual productions. It also demands a strong appetite for exploring, testing, and adopting new tools and technologies, AI‑driven optimisation, and advanced analytics.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 You will report to the Director of COM and work in close coordination with other divisions and relevant services involved in digital communication, content production and senior leadership visibility.
   

  

 The position involves managing a multidisciplinary team, handling a high volume of time sensitive content and navigating a rapidly evolving digital landscape. It requires balancing immediate social media needs with more complex audiovisual productions, while maintaining editorial and political sensitivity.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Under the guidance of the Director, and in close cooperation with the Heads of Division in the Communication Department, the Head of the Social Media and Audiovisual Division is responsible for:
   

  

* Setting the direction for the EIB Group’s social media and audiovisual presence, defining workflows and standards that ensure high‑quality, high‑impact delivery across all channels.
* Managing the planning, creation, and production of engaging social and audiovisual content, ensuring it reflects institutional and communication priorities and meets the highest professional standards, safeguarding coherence and consistency.
* Prioritising social media and audiovisual activities based on institutional priorities and resource availability, managing demand across the organisation and ensuring focus on high-impact initiatives.
* Overseeing and developing a multi-platform approach to audience engagement through social media and video products, with an excellent understanding of formats and styles, and the needs of each platform.
* Overseeing and coordinating marketing activities including paid, ensuring targeted and cost-effective use of promotion.
* Advising senior leadership on their social media presence.
* Leading and developing a multidisciplinary team of social media strategists and videographers, ensuring clarity of roles, strong collaboration, and a culture of continuous improvement.
* Driving data-informed decision-making by establishing KPIs and overseeing performance monitoring, social listening and analytics to assess impact, identify trends, risks and opportunities, and generate insights. Ensuring that these insights are used to refine content planning, audience targeting and platform optimisation, and shared across communication colleagues.
* Ensuring compliance and risk management, including data protection and reputational safeguards in all social and audiovisual outputs.
* Ensuring effective information flow and sharing of practices across the division and with other EIB Group services, fostering coordination and consistency.
* Recruiting, developing and managing staff, ensuring the right skills, clear objectives and strong engagement to deliver results.
* Creating an environment that empowers staff, encourages collaboration, supports accountability and keeps the team focused on the Group’s priorities.


**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in communication, digital media, journalism, marketing, audiovisual production
* At least 10 years of professional experience in social media, digital communication, or audiovisual production in a communication agency or corporate/institutional setting, including managing complex projects with several stakeholders.
* Experience or proven ability in managing and coaching staff, ideally in multicultural environments or international organisations (e.g. contribution to: determining team resources and skills; establishing objectives; assessing performance; delegating and supervising tasks; guiding, motivating, coaching and providing feedback).
* Proven experience in overseeing design and delivery of high quality audiovisual content, including scripting, filming, editing, livestreaming, and overseeing production workflows.
* In‑depth understanding of social media ecosystems, audience behaviour, platform algorithms, and digital content strategies across all major channels.
* Strong command of data‑driven audience targeting, analytics, performance optimisation, and evidence‑based decision‑making.
* Excellent knowledge of social media publishing tools, monitoring and analytics platforms, and familiarity with AI enhanced content creation, optimisation, and workflow automation.
* Solid understanding of digital marketing principles, paid promotion, and amplification strategies.
* Familiarity with the EU institutional landscape and an understanding of the EIB Group’s mission, objectives, and operating environment.
* Fluency in English both written and spoken. Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage.


 Competencies
   

  

*Find out more about EIB core behavioural skills and managerial competencies* 
 here
   

  

 To find out more about our eligibility criteria click here
   

  

 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

 Deadline for applications:
 **31 March 2026**

title: iOS Engineer
description:
At Svea Solar, we have a clear vision – to fix the planet. As Sweden’s and one of Europe’s leading players in energy technology, we are driving the energy transition with solar power and smart energy solutions. ⚡
   

  

 We’re now expanding our app team with an
 **iOS Engineer** 
 . Are you ready to join the Power Shift?
   

  

**About The Role & The Team**
 As our iOS Engineer, you’ll help shape our new app and its extensions, including the Apple Watch app. The app already supports tens of thousands (soon hundreds of thousands 😉) customers in optimizing their energy use. Our iOS app is built with SwiftUI and Swift concurrency, connected to a newly developed backend, using Apple’s latest frameworks. The minimum iOS version is 16 (but is being bumped to 18 this fall).
   

  

 You’ll work closely with our iOS Staff Engineer, Product Manager, and the rest of the app team to define and deliver on our roadmap, reporting to the Engineering Manager.
   

  

*We follow a collaboration-first policy, working three days a week from our Alvik office.*
**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Take part in defining the architecture, platform, and best practices for the development of our apps on iOS and watchOS
* Write, review, and test code in a collaborative environment with other software engineers
* Work closely with other engineers, designers, and product owners to explore new solutions to problems
* Contribute to the development roadmap on how to best further us on our way to rid the planet of fossil fuels


 Are we a match?
   

  

**We’re Looking For You Who…**
* Values team success over personal success.
* Are fluent in English - our organizational language.
* Have extensive experience in Swift, with solid knowledge of Swift concurrency and SwiftUI.
* Write readable, idiomatic, and maintainable Swift, and are happy to follow established coding guidelines and workflows.
* Have released at least one app on the App Store, or you have a project in the works you can show us.


**Bonus Points If You**
* Stays up to date with advancements in Swift 6.


 🌍 Life as a Power Shifter - What do we offer you
   

  

**The opportunity to make an impact** 
 – your work directly contributes to fixing the planet and driving the energy transition.
   

  

**About**
**A value-driven workplace** 
 – read more about our values here.
   

  

**The chance to own your results** 
 – grow, take responsibility, and power up as both we and the energy industry evolve.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusivity** 
 – different perspectives drive innovation. Here, you can be yourself and contribute with your experiences, identities, and ideas.
   

  

**Employment benefits** 
 – occupational pension, 30 days of vacation, wellness allowance, parking, and more.
   

  

**Flexibility/ hybrid work** 
 – work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

 Want to see what life at Svea Solar really looks like? Follow us on Instagram: @LifeAtSveaSolar
   

  

 ⚡Who are we
   

  

 As Sweden’s - and one of Europe’s - leading providers of energy tech and solar, we help our customers optimize their energy use with smart, connected solutions. From solar panels to heat pumps, batteries, EV chargers, and software, we’re shaping the future of energy. We call it
 **The Power Shift** 
 . And the ones driving it?
 **Power Shifters** 
 .
   

  

  

  

**About Our Recruitment Process**
* With structured interviews and assessments through Alva Labs, we make sure our recruitment process is fair, inclusive, and unbiased - because diversity is key to innovation!
* Read more about our Recruitment process here.


 👉
 **Ready to become a Power Shifter?** 
 We review applications on a rolling basis, so don’t wait to send yours in!

title: Gruppchef Identity & Access Management
description:
Handelsbanken söker en erfaren och engagerad gruppchef till Team Identity and Access – ett verksamhetskritiskt område. I rollen leder du ett kompetent team, arbetar både operativt och strategiskt och bidrar aktivt till bankens utveckling inom identitets- och åtkomsthantering.
   

  

**Ditt team**
 Som gruppchef för ett av våra IAM team har du personalansvar för både anställda och konsulter och är även Business Owner för teamet. Teamet består av flera seniora roller såsom utvecklare, testare, arkitekter och verksamhetsansvariga samt ledande roller.
   

  

 Teamen arbetar fristående enligt agila principer. Du ingår i en erfaren ledningsgrupp där kunskapsutbyte och gemensam utveckling står i fokus.
   

  

 Teamet är stort och präglas av hög kompetens och lång erfarenhet inom området. Arbetet sker i en koncernövergripande och till stor del engelsktalande kontext. Tillsammans verkar ni för att uppnå bankens mål och värderingar med ett tydligt fokus på jämställdhet, mångfald och en inkluderande kultur i det dagliga arbetet.
   

  

**Din roll**
 I rollen som gruppchef för Team Identity and Access har du ansvar för att leda och utveckla teamet med ett helhetsansvar. Du arbetar både operativt och strategiskt med utveckling av identitets- och åtkomsthantering (IAM), ett verksamhetskritiskt och komplext område där tekniska lösningar möter verksamhetsnära behov.
   

  

 Rollen innebär ett stort mandat att påverka och bidra till bankens strategiska arbete inom IAM. Du har många kontaktytor och ett globalt ansvar, vilket ger dig bred insyn i bankens verksamhet. Med ett decentraliserat arbetssätt och stort förtroende får du goda möjligheter att utveckla ditt ledarskap, fördjupa din kompetens och arbeta långsiktigt i linje med bankens mål och hållbarhetsambitioner.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som har tidigare erfarenhet som chef och som trivs i rollen som ledare. Du har dokumenterad förmåga att leda och utveckla team i IT-nära verksamhet och är van vid att arbeta i komplexa, koncernövergripande funktioner. Du har ett långsiktigt perspektiv och bidrar till hållbara resultat över tid. Som ledare är du trygg, kommunikativ och engagerande, med förmåga att anpassa din kommunikation efter målgrupp och arbeta pedagogiskt i hur du vägleder och stöttar andra. Med lyhördhet och god analytisk förmåga kan du snabbt sätta dig in i komplexa frågeställningar, se samband och prioritera rätt.
   

  

 Du har ett genuint intresse för IAM och en vilja att förstå och utvecklas inom området, även om du inte behöver ha djup specialistkunskap från start. Genom struktur, engagemang och ett inkluderande förhållningssätt skapar du goda förutsättningar för teamet att organisera sitt arbete och utvecklas i en föränderlig miljö.
   

  

 Du kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift och har erfarenhet av att samverka med många olika intressenter.
   

  

 Det är meriterande om du har arbetat med köpta IT-system, leverantörs- och avtalsansvar samt har kunskap inom infrastruktur, informations- och IT-säkerhet, IAM och regelverk.
   

  

 Urval och intervjuer sker löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas före sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
*Som ett steg i Handelsbankens rekryteringsprocess krävs en godkänd bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidat, utförd av en extern part, innan anställning kan ske.*
**Kontaktuppgifter**
**Rekryterande chef:** 
 Jessica Jerneborg, jessica.jerneborg@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Talent Acquisition Partner:** 
 Rebecka Kjellström, rebecka.kjellstrom@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Facklig representant Finansförbundet:** 
 Per Almshult, per.almshult@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen:** 
 Bjarne Nilsson, bjarne.nilsson@handelsbanken.se

title: AI Automation Lead
description:
**This job is with EQT Group, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ+ business community. Please do not contact the recruiter directly.** 
****AI Automation Lead****
 We’re hiring an AI Automation Lead to help EQT replace manual work with intelligent automation. Starting in the procurement and vendor domain, you’ll identify high-impact opportunities across the digital workplace and lead the design and deployment of AI agents and automation to transform how we work.
   

  

**About The Digital Employee Experience Team**
 The Digital Experience (DEX) team sits within EQT’s Technology department and focuses on enabling smarter, more connected ways of working. We combine design thinking, platform strategy, and intelligent automation to improve collaboration, reduce complexity, and elevate the work experience for EQT teams globally.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This role exists to accelerate EQT’s use of automation and agentic AI — to reduce manual work, improve transparency, and drive digital scale. You’ll start by focusing on the procurement and vendor management domain, building AI-enabled workflows that streamline assurance, evidence collection, and vendor lifecycle operations. From there, you’ll expand to other high-friction areas across the DEX landscape.
   

  

 You will be hands-on with strategy and execution. You’ll work closely with key stakeholders and partners to turn complex processes into scalable, auditable automations. Your success depends on execution, clarity of ownership, and your ability to transform work through smart technology.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Identify and prioritize manual workflows in the DEX space that are ready for automation or AI enablement.
* Design and deploy intelligent agents to handle process orchestration, control testing, evidence collection, and other repeatable tasks.
* Deliver high-impact automation projects, starting in procurement and vendor operations.
* Ensure all automated workflows meet EQT standards for auditability, traceability, and risk control.
* Partner with system owners, Legal, Compliance, Finance, and Security to align automation with policies and expectations.
* Collaborate with external partners and gradually internalize automation capability within EQT.
* Communicate clearly about scope, risks, and impact to enable trust and adoption.


****What success looks like in the first 12–24 months****
* Automated vendor assurance and monitoring reduce manual effort by 60% or more.
* Core procurement workflows are simplified and AI-enabled, with fewer handoffs and clearer ownership.
* EQT’s automation platform expands from rule-based tasks to intelligent, agent-driven flows.
* Internal capability begins to own and maintain AI agents without external consultants.
* Automation use cases expand beyond procurement into workplace collaboration and document processes.


****Scope and interfaces****
* In scope: Automation of processes in DEX, starting with procurement and vendor workflows.
* Out of scope: Direct vendor management or ownership of procurement budgets.
* Key interfaces: Digital Workplace, Procurement, Legal, Finance, Compliance, Security.


****About you****
 You are thoughtful, curious, and delivery-focused. You’re excited about applying automation and AI in ways that make people’s work lives simpler and more scalable. You’re comfortable starting small, building trust, and showing results quickly — while always keeping risk and governance in mind.
   

  

**Essential Skills And Experience**
* Proven experience in automation platforms (e.g., Workato, UiPath, or similar), workflow design, or process transformation.
* Experience deploying intelligent agents or AI-powered automations in real-world settings.
* Strong understanding of auditability, explainability, and compliance in automation.
* Ability to work cross-functionally and influence without direct authority.
* Clear communicator with a structured, outcome-oriented mindset.


**You’ll do well here if you:**
* Are energized by messy processes and love making them better.
* Can say no with data and yes with care.
* Have a low-ego, high-ownership mindset.
* Are comfortable with ambiguity and change.
* Believe automation should be explainable, measurable, and human-in-the-loop where needed.


****What we offer****
* A visible, hands-on role with the opportunity to shape EQT’s automation journey.
* A collaborative culture that values curiosity, integrity, and continuous improvement.
* A chance to work with cutting-edge tools and bring AI to life in meaningful, operational ways.
* Support to grow your capabilities while building scalable solutions across the firm.


**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
 Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.
   

  

**About EQT**
 EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of almost three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 269 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌136 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.
   

  

 More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram
   

  

 ]]>

title: Account Manager inom IT
description:
Nu söker vi på Eccera en Account Manager till vår verksamhet i vårt nya, fina kontor i Solna.
 



  





*Start:* 
 enligt överenskommelse
 



*Omfattning:* 
 Heltid, kontorstid på plats.
 



*Placering:* 
 Stockholm/Solna
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 Rollen är säljorienterad och arbetet är till 100 % riktat mot försäljning. I rollen som Account Manager blir din huvuduppgift att självständigt hämta, driva och utveckla affärer. En viktig del kommer vara nyförsäljning och du förväntas själv kunna skapa ingångar till nya spännande kunder. Du kommer att arbeta med stora/små kunder och projekt där uppdragen varierar mellan allt från supporttekniker till andra seniora IT-roller.
 



  





 Tjänsten innebär eget ansvar för din kundstock, budget och dina egna kundrelationer. Det är viktigt att du har en hög aktivitetsnivå, är målmedveten och kundfokuserad. För att lyckas i arbetet har du även god förmåga att skapa relationer och att alltid sätta kunden i fokus. Merförsäljning hos befintliga kunder tillhör också nyckelaktiviteterna.
 



  





**Vi söker dig som** 



* idag jobbar med försäljning inom B2B eller motsvarande, gärna inom IT-branschen
* har rätt inställning, driv och sociala egenskaper
* är målfokuserad och är beredd att kämpa för att nå resultat
* har ett intresse för att göra affärer och skapa goda relationer med kunder
* är en ödmjuk teamplayer eftersom man behöver samarbeta med övriga säljare / konsultchefer / rekryterare



  





 Utöver detta har du B-körkort, goda kunskaper i svenska och grundläggande kunskaper i engelska samt någon eftergymnasial utbildning inom teknik / IT / sälj eller motsvarande.
 



  





 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med 6 månaders provanställning.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 



* En stimulerande arbetsmiljö där din insats verkligen gör skillnad
* Möjlighet att arbeta med spännande teknik och innovativa lösningar
* Konkurrenskraftig lön och förmåner
* Ett tight och stöttande team där vi hjälper varandra att växa och utvecklas



  





 Så, är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär? Skicka in din ansökan idag och låt oss tillsammans skapa framgång både för dig och för Eccera. Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till vårt team!

title: Global Head of Supply Chain & Sourcing
description:
**Global Head of Supply Chain & Sourcing** 




*We are supporting a global industrial company in the search for new talent.* 




*The organization develops and manufactures advanced braking and hydraulic systems used in demanding applications worldwide. As part of a privately owned international investment group operating across several industrial sectors, the company is experiencing strong growth and expansion.* 




*This is an exciting opportunity to join a dynamic, international environment where you can contribute to building and shaping a growing global business.* 




  





**About the Role** 




 We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Global Head of Supply Chain & Sourcing to lead and transform a multi-site supply chain into a strategic, lean, and resilient function. This is a key leadership role with responsibility for driving operational excellence, supplier performance, and cost leadership across our production network and global supplier base.
 



 You will define and implement the supply chain strategy across our production sites, lead global sourcing initiatives, and ensure compliance with industry standards while fostering innovation and sustainability.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Develop and implement a supply chain & sourcing strategy across our production sites.
* Coordinate the strategy & action with people at same position from other divisions within the group.
* Lead strategic sourcing, supplier development, and contract negotiations.
* Drive ERP utilization for procurement, planning, and supplier collaboration.
* Manage supply risk through dual sourcing, scorecards, and contingency planning.
* Collaborate cross-functionally with Operations, Engineering, Quality, and Finance.
* Lead and mentor purchasing teams across entities.
* Ensure supplier compliance with applicable standards and regulations.



  





**Your Profile** 




 To be successful in this role we see that you have a hands-on approach and take ownership of your tasks and responsibilities. That you are able to maintain a clear overview and make well-informed decisions with a detail-oriented and highly structured approach. You are also skilled at communicating financial information clearly to all stakeholders and a team player who values involvement, development, and recognition.
 



 Further you have the following experience and competence:
 


* Hold a Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Business, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Have 10+ years of experience in strategic procurement and supply chain leadership in industrial sectors.
* Strong knowledge of lean supply chain principles (JIT, Kanban, value stream mapping).
* Proven track record in managing complex international supply networks.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Dynamics 365 and Power BI.
* Fluent in English; additional language skills (e.g., German, Spanish, Polish, or Chinese) are a plus.



  





**As a Person, You Are:** 



* Hands-on and take ownership of your tasks and responsibilities.
* Able to maintain a clear overview and make well-informed decisions.
* Detail-oriented and highly structured.
* Skilled at communicating financial information clearly to all stakeholders.
* A team player who values involvement, development, and recognition.



  





**Travel & Location** 




 This role can be based at any of the sites in Europe and it demands regular travel across sites and supplier locations. Occasional international travel may be required to engage with global suppliers and support strategic initiatives.
 



  





**What we offer** 




 You will join a motivated, international team that values collaboration, trust, and personal growth. We believe in empowering every employee to develop their strengths and contribute to our shared success. Respect for each other, commitment, simplicity, and joy characterize the atmosphere. Teamwork and innovation are central parts in they daily business.
 



  





**Application** 




 Submit your application via the ValueOne website:
 



 Selection and interviews are conducted continuously, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.
 



  





 For questions regarding the assignment, please contact
 
 Tobias Albrektsson at tobias.albrektsson@valueone.se
 



  





 ValueOne is a strong partner to companies who desire to develop and streamline their Supply Chain. With our background from leading positions in Supply Chain Management in different organizations, we understand your needs. In a fast-changing world with the requirement to continually improve, streamline or create new Supply Solutions, we can effectively help solve the situations and challenges you face. Our offer includes Interim Solutions, Recruitment, Management Consulting and Learnings via CIPS.
 



  





 ValueOne
 



 Supply Chain.
 



 Delivered Right.
 



 www.valueone.se

title: Product Manager, Courier Delivery Experience
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 We are looking for a Product Manager to join our Courier and Delivery Experience team. This role will focus on ensuring world-class courier and consumer delivery experiences while optimizing the delivery process for operational excellence. The team’s focus is on enhancing key touchpoints in the courier journey, ensuring seamless delivery experiences, and developing product innovations that improve Courier and Consumer experiences and reliability.
   

  

 You will play a crucial role in shaping the courier experience, ensuring that our couriers feel valued and supported while enhancing the efficiency of deliveries. By blending operational expertise with a deep understanding of courier needs, you will improve the user journey from onboarding couriers to completing deliveries. From designing new features that boost courier satisfaction to refining delivery processes, your work will contribute to key metrics across courier engagement, performance, and satisfaction.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will have an exceptional track record in product management, with proven success in working with cross-functional teams across engineering, design, product, and operations. You will define the vision and roadmap for courier and delivery experiences across multiple projects. Working in partnership with business stakeholders, you will also collaborate on cross-team initiatives, contributing to the broader business strategy while ensuring a deep understanding of the courier experience.
   

  

**Our humble expectations**
 You could come to this role from various backgrounds, but ideally, you bring:
   

  

* Several years of experience in product management, specializing in consumer-facing products, courier services, delivery systems, or logistics.
* Demonstrated expertise in supporting cross-functional teams and fostering operational excellence in fast-paced, high-demand industries.
* Proven track record in building products influencing cross-functional teams, including engineering, data, design, and operations.
* Expertise in developing user-centric products, with the ability to address complex user experience-related challenges.
* High ownership and collaborative capabilities, making thoughtful decisions, and focusing on product details to ensure execution aligns with the vision.
* Strong ability to define, execute, and measure meaningful OKRs, ensuring alignment with company-wide goals and fostering bottom-up alignment from your team.
* Ability to focus on the bigger picture, creating solutions that benefit couriers, operations, and customer experiences across the organization.
* Excellent stakeholder management skills, able to work effectively with diverse internal teams and external partners, while confidently engaging with leadership in a high-visibility role.


 The position will be filled as soon as we find the right person, so make sure to apply as soon as you realize you really, really want to join us!
   

  

 The compensation will be a negotiable combination of monthly pay and DoorDash RSUs. The latter makes it exceptionally easy to be excited about our company growing and doing well, as you’ll own a piece of the pie.
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer
description:
Our Engagement Product Development team is growing and we are now looking for a Senior Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer to join! Engagement at Betsson Group ensures our customers come back for more. It’s all about loyalty. We provide a world class customer experience beyond the game play featuring Tournaments, Dynamic personalized campaigns and much more!
 


**A taster of what you will be involved with** 
* Act as a consultant and technical expert on the Salesforce platform by providing support to stakeholders and users.
* Closely collaborate with experts from other areas to leverage on the Salesforce technologies through integrations with other solutions.
* Setting up new business units in SFMC that include but not limited to the configuration of the data points and FTP locations.
* Use AMP script to develop dynamic content in SFMC.
* Use SSJS to develop new custom applications in Journey Builder including leveraging the REST & SOAP APIS by creating installed packages.
* Build targeted audience segments based on email behavioral data and CRM attributes using Data Extensions and SQL Setup.
* Leveraging on the capabilities provided by Journey Builder, Automation Studio, Interaction Studio, Content Builder, Email Studio, and other solutions to deliver multi-touch communications.
* Campaigns and Triggered sends being able to oversee complex campaign workflow rules and data segmentation.
* Oversee the ETL of multiple business units that include suggesting best practices on daily automations.
* Configuring the database environment by creating the data model using data extensions and Contact Builder inside the Data Designer.
* Define data validation, cleansing, deduplication rules and processes in SFMC.
* Define data connectors for data ingestion into Salesforce across Betsson’s technical ecosystem, partnering with CRM and Data teams, as needed.
* Assist in the technical and architectural framework for the SFDC applications.
* Ensuring scalability of all the solutions developed.
* Serve as the subject matter expert for SFMC for the internal stakeholders that include managers and end-users.
* As an expert on SFMC, it is expected to gather requirements, discuss, and implement them based on best practices.
* Able to communicate technical and business solutions by developing and presenting information to multiple audiences.


**What we are looking for** 
* University degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Developer (or equivalent certification).
* At least 3 years of hands-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
* Strong knowledge of Salesforce administration (minimum 1 year).
* Solid understanding of SQL, data modeling, and integration methods.
* Strong documentation and knowledge-sharing mindset.
* Ability to stay updated on industry trends, emerging technologies, and third-party solutions.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
* Experience with JavaScript
* Experience with Salesforce Service Cloud and Sales Cloud is a plus.


**What we offer** 

 We can offer you an environment full of ambition and passion. One day is never like the other as the only constant is change, to the better, to the greater. We strive to be the best in whatever field we choose to play on, and we make sure to have fun along the way!
 


* A friendly, open and humble working environment, where you will have the chance to work alongside with colleagues from all over the world
* A chance to evolve your skills together with your colleagues with various programs and initiatives
* Personal development through courses, in-house training and external certification



 Freedom with responsibility

title: Handläggare – arbeta med EU-samordningens frågor i sommar
description:
****Statsrådsberedningen****
 Har du erfarenhet av praktik vid en EU-samordningsenhet i Regeringskansliet eller på svenska EU-representationen i Bryssel och söker ett stimulerande sommarjobb? Som sommarvikarie ges du möjlighet till fördjupad förståelse för hur EU-arbetet i Regeringskansliet och EU-förhandlingar fungerar. Vi erbjuder arbete med intressanta frågor i en omväxlande och spännande arbetsmiljö.
   

  

****Din arbetsdag. Sveriges morgondag.****
 Statsrådsberedningen har ansvar för att leda och samordna arbetet i Regeringskansliet. Som handläggare kommer du att stötta EU-samordningen i Statsrådsberedningen under sommaren 2026. Arbetet är av både analytisk och administrativ karaktär och innebär ett brett ansvarsområde med varierande uppgifter.
   

  

 Du deltar i det löpande EU-arbetet när det gäller till exempel det administrativa arbetet inför instruktionsgivning till förhandlingar i Coreper I och II i Bryssel och vid skriftliga samråd med riksdagen inför beslut i ministerrådet. Aktiv medverkan vid förberedelserna av ministerrådsmöte kan även komma att ingå i tjänsten. Du ska med kort varsel vara redo att sätta dig in i nya arbetsuppgifter.
   

  

 Du tar fram underlag till ledningen och deltar i möten och föredragningar samt beredningar av EU-frågor.
   

  

 I arbetet ingår även diarieföring, utlämnandehantering, möteshantering och annat administrativt stöd.
   

  

 Följande enheter inom EU-samordningen berörs av denna annons som handläggare under sommaren:
   

  

* Kansliet för allmänna rådet och Coreper 1
* Kansliet för Europeiska rådet och Coreper 2


 Läs mer om vår verksamhet på www.regeringen.se .
 ****Din bakgrund****
 För att vara aktuell behöver du:
   

  

* vara i slutfasen av dina akademiska studier eller ha en klar akademisk examen inom område som arbetsgivaren finner relevant för tjänsten.
* ha genomfört praktik vid en EU-samordningsenhet i Regeringskansliet eller på svenska EU-representationen i Bryssel som en del av din högskole-/universitetsutbildning under höstterminen 2025 eller vårterminen 2026
* ha god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* svenskt medborgarskap
* kunna infinna dig på plats i Stockholm för säkerhetsprövning


 Det är meriterande om du har:
   

  

* erfarenhet av praktik i Statsrådsberedningen
* kunskap om Regeringskansliets EU-arbete och arbetsformer
* kunskap om EU:s institutionernas roller
* kunskap om de EU-relaterade it-stöden EU-punkten och Delegates Portal
* erfarenhet av administrativt eller serviceinriktat arbete


****Dina egenskaper****
 För tjänsten behöver du vara flexibel, noggrann och ha gott omdöme. Du behöver ha ett strukturerat arbetssätt och vara ansvarstagande. Du ska vara serviceinriktad och kunna arbeta både självständigt och i grupp. Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

****Övrigt****
 Vi erbjuder en eller flera tidsbegränsade anställningar under sommaren 2026.
   

  

 Arbetet sker mestadels under kontorsarbetstid samt innebär schemalagd beredskap/övertid vissa kvällar och helger.
   

  

 En säkerhetsprövning genomförs innan beslut om anställning fattas.
   

  

****Är du intresserad?****
 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder, kontakta rekryteringsspecialist Kristina Rostedt. Fackliga kontaktpersoner är Susanne Grund för Saco och Karina Åbom-Engberg för ST. Du når alla via Regeringskansliets växel, 08‑405 10 00.
   

  

 Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet, men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Välkommen att registrera din ansökan i vårt rekryteringsverktyg senast den 26 mars 2026.
   

  

 Regeringskansliets uppdrag är att stödja regeringen i dess arbete med att styra Sverige och förverkliga sin politik. Här arbetar 4 800 personer, varav 600 utomlands. Regeringskansliet välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter. Vi ser jämställdhet och mångfald som en styrka och tillgång och vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering. Statsrådsberedningen har ansvar för att leda och samordna arbetet i Regeringskansliet.

title: Chief Financial Officer
description:
*Operational builder for Hailey: A fast-growing SaaS company 🚀* 




  





**About Hailey 🩷** 




 During the spring of 2020 Hailey HR was founded. We're a Swedish SaaS HR-tech company that want to digitalise, simplify and modernise the HR industry with our HR-system.
 



  





 Since launching our first paid version of Hailey in 2022, we have grown to over 1,200 customers, primarily across the Nordics. Today, we are a team of 160+ employees with an ARR of SEK 190 million, and continue to experience strong growth. We are fully funded, with a solid cash position, and are just months away from becoming EBITDA-positive.
 



  





 This role will play a key part in shaping the next chapter of our journey, laying the groundwork for long-term growth that could include an IPO within the coming years.
 



  





**About the position 💼** 




 In this role, you will be responsible for building a modern, data driven and scalable finance department in our growing company. We are looking for someone who is ready to work hands on - a builder, not a maintainer.
 



  





**As CFO at Hailey, your goal is to create structures, processes, and governance that:** 




  




* Enables continued rapid growth
* Strengthens profitability and cash flow
* Provides full transparency in SaaS metrics
* Makes the company “IPO-ready” should it become relevant in the future 🚀



  





 We believe that candidates for this role may bring a variety of experiences to the table, and we want to remain open to different backgrounds. The role will be shaped based on the competences you bring - either a more traditional CFO position focused on financial control, or a broader mandate with responsibilities for Business Development and Revenue Operations.
 



  





 You are therefore equally welcome to apply whether you come from a strong accounting background with experience running a traditional finance function, or from a more business-oriented background with strengths in business development and analysis, combined with strong organisational skills and a solid understanding of financial management and governance.
 



  





 If you’ve already vibe-coded something yourself to support your work or your department, you’re probably a candidate for us! (Not a requirement, but we do expect this kind of curiosity and interest in new technology.)
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 




 You are expected to drive development within the scope of your area of responsibility and ensure that ongoing operations run effectively. At the same time, the role involves working with different stakeholders and project groups to make sure this happens.
 



  





**📝 Financial Governance & Reporting:** 
 Budgeting, accounting and financial reporting to ensure compliance. This area of responsibility is currently owned by our Head of Finance, and you as CFO will be responsible to build an organisation to lead and allocate the work. Through development of working methods, we want you to take the finance department to the next level and prepare us for a potential IPO.
 



  





**📊 SaaS Metrics & Business Optimisation:** 
 Responsible to build a robust structure for data sources and BI related to the SaaS business.
 



  





**💰 Billing & Revenue Operations:** 
 This area of responsibility is flexible depending on your background, and would involve ownership of the flow between sales, billing & accounting. As CFO, you are expected to independently drive the development below and ensure continuous improvement and collaborate with other stakeholders.
 



  





**Examples of what is included in the Billing & Revenue Operations responsibility:** 



* Automate billing and follow-up by defining requirements for and developing our billing system
* Establish pricing governance together with the Head of Sales, i.e. structure subscription logic, discounts and special agreements
* Ensure accurate data flows from CRM to accounting
* Ensure that a contract management setup is implemented together with the Head of Legal
* Participate in cross-functional projects related to areas such as pricing, packaging, and identifying new potential revenue streams



  





**What are we looking for?** 



* 10+ years of experience within the area.
* Relevant post secondary-degree such as Master of Science in Business and Economics, or Master of Science in Industrial Engineering and Management.
* Full fluency in Swedish & great English skills (speech and writing).
* Regardless of your background, it is important that you thrive in a dynamic and fast-growing environment. You should enjoy continuously developing and improving your organisation, and have a genuine interest in new technologies and processes.



  





**More information:** 




**Scope:** 
 100%
 



**Start:** 
 Whenever you’re ready!
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (on-site)

title: Affärsområdeschef Medovia Tech
description:
Vill du ta helhetsansvar för att bygga och skala ett nytt affärsområde inom tech?
   

  

 Vill du kombinera strategiskt ledarskap med operativ kraft i en kontext där teknik, affär och samhällsnytta möts?
   

  

 Nu söker vi en Affärsområdeschef som vill forma och leda Medovia Techs fortsatta resa.
   

  

**Din vardag**
 Som Affärsområdeschef för Medovia Tech har du ett övergripande ansvar för att bygga, strukturera och utveckla affärsområdet med fullt P&L-ansvar.
   

  

 Rollen är både strategisk och operativ – du sätter riktningen, men är också nära affären, kunderna och teamet.
   

  

 Du etablerar struktur, governance och arbetssätt som skapar skalbarhet och långsiktig hållbarhet. Det innebär att definiera roller och kompetenser, tydliggöra ansvarsfördelning samt skapa effektiva gränssnitt mot centrala funktioner, inte minst IT. Initialt bygger du organisationen stegvis och tar ett brett ansvar i uppbyggnadsfasen.
   

  

 I uppdraget ingår även att följa och ta tillvara på tekniska möjligheter såsom automatisering och AI där det skapar tydligt affärs‑ och verksamhetsvärde, både i interna arbetssätt och i Medovia Techs erbjudande.
   

  

 Parallellt driver du den kommersiella utvecklingen. Du ansvarar för att paketera och vidareutveckla erbjudandet, identifiera nya affärsmöjligheter och bygga långsiktiga kundrelationer, med fokus på Norden. Rollen innebär nära dialog med kunder inom såväl privat som offentlig sektor, inklusive upphandlingar och komplexa affärer på ledningsnivå.
   

  

 Du rapporterar till VD och ingår i koncernledningen. Förväntan är att du aktivt bidrar till både affärsområdets och koncernens strategiska utveckling.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
**Vi Söker Dig Som Har**
* Flerårig erfarenhet av att leda och utveckla teknik- eller produktbolag
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av P&L-ansvar och tillväxt
* Stark förståelse för IT-system, arkitektur och modern systemutveckling
* Erfarenhet från produkt- och/eller SaaS-verksamhet
* Vana att paketera och kommersialisera tekniska lösningar
* Erfarenhet av att bygga organisation i uppstarts- eller förändringsfas
* God erfarenhet av komplex B2B-försäljning, gärna mot offentlig sektor
* Erfarenhet av nordisk marknad
* Vana att arbeta med moderna digitala verktyg, inklusive AI‑baserade stöd, i affär och vardagsarbete
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


 Det är meriterande med erfarenhet av försäljning mot offentlig sektor, gärna inom hälso‑ och sjukvård. Förståelse för längre säljcykler, upphandlingsprocesser och arbetssätt i offentliga affärer ses som ett plus. Erfarenhet från både offentlig och privat miljö värderas högt för denna roll.
   

  

 Som ledare är du trygg, analytisk och affärsdriven. Du kombinerar handlingskraft med förmågan att skapa engagemang och delaktighet. Du trivs i en miljö med stort mandat och högt ansvar, där struktur skapas parallellt med tillväxt. Ditt ledarskap präglas av prestigelöshet, tydlighet och en genuin vilja att bygga starka, samarbetsorienterade team. Du är bekväm i osäkerhet, vågar fatta beslut och har förmågan att omsätta teknik till konkret affärsvärde.
   

  

**Om oss**
 Medovia grundades med ambitionen att förenkla och förbättra för vården och är idag en långsiktig partner till såväl privat som offentlig sektor. Genom kombinationen av läkemedel, förbrukningsmaterial och digitala lösningar skapas kund‑ och samhällsnytta varje dag.
   

  

 Med Medovia Tech etableras nu ett nytt strategiskt affärsområde med fokus på teknik, system och skalbara lösningar för framtidens vård. Verksamheten präglas av en entreprenöriell och innovativ miljö, där idéer snabbt kan omsättas i handling, nya arbetssätt uppmuntras och samarbete sker nära både verksamhet och kunder. Här kombineras stabiliteten i en etablerad koncern med energin och handlingskraften i ett bolag under uppbyggnad.
   

  

**Kontakt**
 I denna rekrytering samarbetar Medovia med Wise IT. Vill du veta mer, kontakta ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Sandra Åhs på sandra.ahs@wise.se.
   

  

 Vi kan tyvärr inte ta emot ansökningar via mail då vi värnar om din personliga integritet. Du kan läsa mer om hur vi behandlar personuppgifter enligt GDPR i Wise Group-koncernens policy för behandling av personuppgifter.
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag för tjänsten är 23/3-2026
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Medovia grundades 2010 i syfte att förenkla och förbättra vården. Sedan dess har tusentals vårdföretag valt oss som sin strategiska partner avseende försörjning av läkemedel och förbrukningsmaterial. Vår vision är att ha vårdens nöjdaste kunder.

title: Customer Interaction Consultant
description:
**About Convatec**
**Pioneering trusted medical solutions to improve the lives we touch:** 
 Convatec is a global medical products and technologies company, focused on solutions for the management of chronic conditions, with leading positions in Advanced Wound Care, Ostomy Care, Continence Care, and Infusion Care. With more than 10,000 colleagues, we provide our products and services in around 90 countries, united by a promise to be forever caring. Our solutions provide a range of benefits, from infection prevention and protection of at-risk skin, to improved patient outcomes and reduced care costs. Convatec’s revenues in 2024 were over $2 billion. The company is a constituent of the FTSE 100 Index (LSE:CTEC). To learn more please visit http://www.convatecgroup.com
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Provide patient service and assess patient’s needs. Provide Convatec ostomy solutions and convert patient’s by offering optional solutions
* Prospect and discover key customer lead opportunities. Cold calls, follow up on opportunities, cross-sell, and up-sell.
* Responsible for maintaining programs and update customer data
* Work closely with the digital team to increase lead generation


**Key Requirements**
* Professional nursing background, preferable ostomy care
* Living in Stockholm region
* Competent in digital technology tools
* Swedish, professional business proficiencies (Speaking/Writing/Reading) and English is mandatory (Speaking/Writing/Reading)
* Customer service professional
* Ability to occasionally to travel
* Office based role, with flexibility when required


**Education/ Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree
* Preferable a scientific degree (healthcare) and/or Ostomy Care product knowledge
* Competent in digital technology tools
* Effective communication skills
* Customer expertise
* Competent in CRM and data analysis tools


**Additional Job Description**
 Our ambitions will bring the very best out in you. You’ll be pushed to
   

  

 aim higher and really own your work. You’ll be encouraged and
   

  

 supported to make things happen, too. It can be challenging. But, as
   

  

 the progress you make will help improve the lives of millions, it’ll be
   

  

 worth it.
   

  

 This is stepping up to a challenge.
   

  

 This is work that’ll
 **move** 
 you.
   

  

**Beware of scams online or from individuals claiming to represent Convatec**
 A formal recruitment process is required for all our opportunities prior to any offer of employment. This will include an interview confirmed by an official Convatec email address.
   

  

 If you receive a suspicious approach over social media, text message, email or phone call about recruitment at Convatec, do not disclose any personal information or pay any fees whatsoever. If you’re unsure, please contact us at careers@Convatec.com.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 Convatec provides equal employment opportunities for all current employees and applicants for employment.
